authors_text: Jimin Tan,Jianan Yang,Sai Wu,Gang Chen,Jake Zhao
title: A critical look at the current train/test split in machine learning
title_zh: 批判性地审视当前机器学习中的训练/测试划分
abstract: The randomized or cross-validated split of training and testing sets has been adopted as the gold standard of machine learning for decades. The establishment of these split protocols are based on two assumptions: (i)-fixing the dataset to be eternally static so we could evaluate different machine learning algorithms or models; (ii)-there is a complete set of annotated data available to researchers or industrial practitioners. However, in this article, we intend to take a closer and critical look at the split protocol itself and point out its weakness and limitation, especially for industrial applications. In many real-world problems, we must acknowledge that there are numerous situations where assumption (ii) does not hold. For instance, for interdisciplinary applications like drug discovery, it often requires real lab experiments to annotate data which poses huge costs in both time and financial considerations. In other words, it can be very difficult or even impossible to satisfy assumption (ii). In this article, we intend to access this problem and reiterate the paradigm of active learning, and investigate its potential on solving problems under unconventional train/test split protocols. We further propose a new adaptive active learning architecture (AAL) which involves an adaptation policy, in comparison with the traditional active learning that only unidirectionally adds data points to the training pool. We primarily justify our points by extensively investigating an interdisciplinary drug-protein binding problem. We additionally evaluate AAL on more conventional machine learning benchmarking datasets like CIFAR-10 to demonstrate the generalizability and efficacy of the new framework.
summary: The randomized or cross-validated split of training and testing sets has been adopted as the gold standard of machine learning for decades. The establishment of these split protocols are based on two assumptions: (i)-fixing the dataset to be eternally static so we could evaluate different machine learning algorithms or models; (ii)-there is a complete set of annotated data available to researchers or industrial practitioners. However, in this article, we intend to take a closer and critical look at the split protocol itself and point out its weakness and limitation, especially for industrial applications. In many real-world problems, we must acknowledge that there are numerous situations where assumption (ii) does not hold. For instance, for interdisciplinary applications like drug discovery, it often requires real lab experiments to annotate data which poses huge costs in both time and financial considerations. In other words, it can be very difficult or even impossible to satisfy assumption (ii). In this article, we intend to access this problem and reiterate the paradigm of active learning, and investigate its potential on solving problems under unconventional train/test split protocols. We further propose a new adaptive active learning architecture (AAL) which involves an adaptation policy, in comparison with the traditional active learning that only unidirectionally adds data points to the training pool. We primarily justify our points by extensively investigating an interdisciplinary drug-protein binding problem. We additionally evaluate AAL on more conventional machine learning benchmarking datasets like CIFAR-10 to demonstrate the generalizability and efficacy of the new framework.
abstract_zh: 几十年来，训练集和测试集的随机或交叉验证分割已被采纳为机器学习的黄金标准。这些分割协议的建立基于两个假设：(i)-将数据集固定为永久静态，以便我们可以评估不同的机器学习算法或模型； (ii)-有一套完整的注释数据可供研究人员或工业从业者使用。然而，在本文中，我们打算更仔细、批判性地审视拆分协议本身，并指出其弱点和局限性，特别是对于工业应用而言。在许多现实世界的问题中，我们必须承认，有很多情况下假设（ii）不成立。例如，对于药物发现等跨学科应用，通常需要真实的实验室实验来注释数据，这在时间和财务方面都会造成巨大的成本。换句话说，满足假设（ii）可能非常困难甚至不可能。在本文中，我们打算解决这个问题并重申主动学习的范式，并研究其在非常规训练/测试分割协议下解决问题的潜力。与仅单向向训练池添加数据点的传统主动学习相比，我们进一步提出了一种新的自适应主动学习架构（AAL），其中涉及适应策略。我们主要通过广泛研究跨学科药物-蛋白质结合问题来证明我们的观点。我们还在 CIFAR-10 等更传统的机器学习基准数据集上评估了 AAL，以证明新框架的通用性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文批判传统机器学习中训练/测试数据分割方法的局限性，并提出一种自适应主动学习架构（AAL）以应对工业场景下标注数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统训练/测试分割假设数据集静态且标注完整，但工业应用中常面临标注成本高或数据不全的挑战，现有方法难以适应此类现实场景。
AI.method: 提出自适应主动学习架构（AAL），通过引入适应策略动态调整数据选择，区别于传统单向增加训练数据的主动学习方法。
AI.result: 在药物-蛋白质结合问题及CIFAR-10数据集上验证AAL的有效性，证明其在非传统分割协议下的泛化能力与性能优势。
AI.conclusion: 传统分割方法存在固有缺陷，自适应主动学习框架能有效应对标注数据受限场景，为工业应用提供新思路。

search_text: A critical look at the current train/test split in machine learning 批判性地审视当前机器学习中的训练/测试划分 The randomized or cross-validated split of training and testing sets has been adopted as the gold standard of machine learning for decades. The establishment of these split protocols are based on two assumptions: (i)-fixing the dataset to be eternally static so we could evaluate different machine learning algorithms or models; (ii)-there is a complete set of annotated data available to researchers or industrial practitioners. However, in this article, we intend to take a closer and critical look at the split protocol itself and point out its weakness and limitation, especially for industrial applications. In many real-world problems, we must acknowledge that there are numerous situations where assumption (ii) does not hold. For instance, for interdisciplinary applications like drug discovery, it often requires real lab experiments to annotate data which poses huge costs in both time and financial considerations. In other words, it can be very difficult or even impossible to satisfy assumption (ii). In this article, we intend to access this problem and reiterate the paradigm of active learning, and investigate its potential on solving problems under unconventional train/test split protocols. We further propose a new adaptive active learning architecture (AAL) which involves an adaptation policy, in comparison with the traditional active learning that only unidirectionally adds data points to the training pool. We primarily justify our points by extensively investigating an interdisciplinary drug-protein binding problem. We additionally evaluate AAL on more conventional machine learning benchmarking datasets like CIFAR-10 to demonstrate the generalizability and efficacy of the new framework. 几十年来，训练集和测试集的随机或交叉验证分割已被采纳为机器学习的黄金标准。这些分割协议的建立基于两个假设：(i)-将数据集固定为永久静态，以便我们可以评估不同的机器学习算法或模型； (ii)-有一套完整的注释数据可供研究人员或工业从业者使用。然而，在本文中，我们打算更仔细、批判性地审视拆分协议本身，并指出其弱点和局限性，特别是对于工业应用而言。在许多现实世界的问题中，我们必须承认，有很多情况下假设（ii）不成立。例如，对于药物发现等跨学科应用，通常需要真实的实验室实验来注释数据，这在时间和财务方面都会造成巨大的成本。换句话说，满足假设（ii）可能非常困难甚至不可能。在本文中，我们打算解决这个问题并重申主动学习的范式，并研究其在非常规训练/测试分割协议下解决问题的潜力。与仅单向向训练池添加数据点的传统主动学习相比，我们进一步提出了一种新的自适应主动学习架构（AAL），其中涉及适应策略。我们主要通过广泛研究跨学科药物-蛋白质结合问题来证明我们的观点。我们还在 CIFAR-10 等更传统的机器学习基准数据集上评估了 AAL，以证明新框架的通用性和有效性。 本文批判传统机器学习中训练/测试数据分割方法的局限性，并提出一种自适应主动学习架构（AAL）以应对工业场景下标注数据不足的问题。 Jimin Tan,Jianan Yang,Sai Wu,Gang Chen,Jake Zhao cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Hanting Li,Mingzhe Sui,Feng Zhao,Zhengjun Zha,Feng Wu
title: MVT: Mask Vision Transformer for Facial Expression Recognition in the wild
title_zh: MVT：用于野外面部表情识别的掩模视觉变压器
abstract: Facial Expression Recognition (FER) in the wild is an extremely challenging task in computer vision due to variant backgrounds, low-quality facial images, and the subjectiveness of annotators. These uncertainties make it difficult for neural networks to learn robust features on limited-scale datasets. Moreover, the networks can be easily distributed by the above factors and perform incorrect decisions. Recently, vision transformer (ViT) and data-efficient image transformers (DeiT) present their significant performance in traditional classification tasks. The self-attention mechanism makes transformers obtain a global receptive field in the first layer which dramatically enhances the feature extraction capability. In this work, we first propose a novel pure transformer-based mask vision transformer (MVT) for FER in the wild, which consists of two modules: a transformer-based mask generation network (MGN) to generate a mask that can filter out complex backgrounds and occlusion of face images, and a dynamic relabeling module to rectify incorrect labels in FER datasets in the wild. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our MVT outperforms state-of-the-art methods on RAF-DB with 88.62%, FERPlus with 89.22%, and AffectNet-7 with 64.57%, respectively, and achieves a comparable result on AffectNet-8 with 61.40%.
summary: Facial Expression Recognition (FER) in the wild is an extremely challenging task in computer vision due to variant backgrounds, low-quality facial images, and the subjectiveness of annotators. These uncertainties make it difficult for neural networks to learn robust features on limited-scale datasets. Moreover, the networks can be easily distributed by the above factors and perform incorrect decisions. Recently, vision transformer (ViT) and data-efficient image transformers (DeiT) present their significant performance in traditional classification tasks. The self-attention mechanism makes transformers obtain a global receptive field in the first layer which dramatically enhances the feature extraction capability. In this work, we first propose a novel pure transformer-based mask vision transformer (MVT) for FER in the wild, which consists of two modules: a transformer-based mask generation network (MGN) to generate a mask that can filter out complex backgrounds and occlusion of face images, and a dynamic relabeling module to rectify incorrect labels in FER datasets in the wild. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our MVT outperforms state-of-the-art methods on RAF-DB with 88.62%, FERPlus with 89.22%, and AffectNet-7 with 64.57%, respectively, and achieves a comparable result on AffectNet-8 with 61.40%.
abstract_zh: 由于不同的背景、低质量的面部图像和注释者的主观性，野外面部表情识别（FER）是计算机视觉中一项极具挑战性的任务。这些不确定性使得神经网络很难在有限规模的数据集上学习鲁棒的特征。此外，网络很容易受到上述因素的影响而做出错误的决策。最近，视觉变换器（ViT）和数据高效图像变换器（DeiT）在传统分类任务中表现出了显着的性能。自注意力机制使 Transformer 在第一层获得全局感受野，从而极大地增强了特征提取能力。在这项工作中，我们首先提出了一种用于野外 FER 的新型纯基于变压器的掩模视觉变压器（MVT），它由两个模块组成：基于变压器的掩模生成网络（MGN），用于生成可以过滤掉复杂背景和人脸图像遮挡的掩模，以及动态重新标记模块，用于纠正野外 FER 数据集中的错误标签。大量的实验结果表明，我们的 MVT 在 RAF-DB 上的性能优于最先进的方法（88.62%）、FERPlus（89.22%）和 AffectNet-7（64.57%），并且在 AffectNet-8 上达到了类似的结果（61.40%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于纯Transformer架构的Mask Vision Transformer（MVT），用于解决真实场景下面部表情识别（FER）中背景复杂、图像质量低和标注主观性等问题。
AI.motivation: 真实场景下的FER因背景复杂、图像质量低和标注主观性导致模型难以学习鲁棒特征，而传统卷积网络和现有Transformer方法在处理这些问题时表现不足。
AI.method: 设计包含两个模块的MVT：基于Transformer的掩码生成网络（MGN）用于过滤复杂背景和面部遮挡，以及动态重标记模块用于修正标注错误。
AI.result: 在RAF-DB（88.62%）、FERPlus（89.22%）和AffectNet-7（64.57%）数据集上优于现有方法，在AffectNet-8上达到61.40%的可比结果。
AI.conclusion: MVT通过掩码生成与动态重标记机制有效提升了真实场景下FER的鲁棒性，验证了Transformer架构在处理复杂视觉任务中的潜力。

authors_text: Fan Yang,Gabriel Barth-Maron,Piotr Stańczyk,Matthew Hoffman,Siqi Liu,Manuel Kroiss,Aedan Pope,Alban Rrustemi
title: Launchpad: A Programming Model for Distributed Machine Learning Research
title_zh: Launchpad：分布式机器学习研究的编程模型
abstract: A major driver behind the success of modern machine learning algorithms has been their ability to process ever-larger amounts of data. As a result, the use of distributed systems in both research and production has become increasingly prevalent as a means to scale to this growing data. At the same time, however, distributing the learning process can drastically complicate the implementation of even simple algorithms. This is especially problematic as many machine learning practitioners are not well-versed in the design of distributed systems, let alone those that have complicated communication topologies. In this work we introduce Launchpad, a programming model that simplifies the process of defining and launching distributed systems that is specifically tailored towards a machine learning audience. We describe our framework, its design philosophy and implementation, and give a number of examples of common learning algorithms whose designs are greatly simplified by this approach.
summary: A major driver behind the success of modern machine learning algorithms has been their ability to process ever-larger amounts of data. As a result, the use of distributed systems in both research and production has become increasingly prevalent as a means to scale to this growing data. At the same time, however, distributing the learning process can drastically complicate the implementation of even simple algorithms. This is especially problematic as many machine learning practitioners are not well-versed in the design of distributed systems, let alone those that have complicated communication topologies. In this work we introduce Launchpad, a programming model that simplifies the process of defining and launching distributed systems that is specifically tailored towards a machine learning audience. We describe our framework, its design philosophy and implementation, and give a number of examples of common learning algorithms whose designs are greatly simplified by this approach.
abstract_zh: 现代机器学习算法成功的主要驱动力是它们处理越来越多数据的能力。因此，分布式系统在研究和生产中的使用已变得越来越普遍，作为扩展数据以应对不断增长的数据的手段。然而，与此同时，分布式学习过程可能会使简单算法的实现变得极其复杂。这尤其成问题，因为许多机器学习从业者并不精通分布式系统的设计，更不用说那些具有复杂通信拓扑的系统了。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 Launchpad，这是一种编程模型，可以简化定义和启动专门针对机器学习受众定制的分布式系统的过程。我们描述了我们的框架、其设计理念和实现，并给出了许多常见学习算法的示例，这些算法的设计通过这种方法大大简化。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为Launchpad的编程模型，旨在简化分布式机器学习系统的开发。
AI.motivation: 随着数据量的增长，分布式系统在机器学习中变得普遍，但其复杂性使得许多实践者难以实现，因此需要简化分布式系统开发的工具。
AI.method: 提出Launchpad编程模型，通过特定设计哲学和实现，简化分布式系统的定义和启动过程，并通过示例展示其效果。
AI.result: 通过Launchpad框架，常见机器学习算法的分布式实现变得更加简单，验证了该模型的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Launchpad为机器学习研究者提供了一个更简便的编程模型，有助于推动分布式机器学习的研究和应用。

This is especially problematic as many machine learning practitioners are not well-versed in the design of distributed systems, let alone those that have complicated communication topologies. In this work we introduce Launchpad, a programming model that simplifies the process of defining and launching distributed systems that is specifically tailored towards a machine learning audience. We describe our framework, its design philosophy and implementation, and give a number of examples of common learning algorithms whose designs are greatly simplified by this approach. 现代机器学习算法成功的主要驱动力是它们处理越来越多数据的能力。因此，分布式系统在研究和生产中的使用已变得越来越普遍，作为扩展数据以应对不断增长的数据的手段。然而，与此同时，分布式学习过程可能会使简单算法的实现变得极其复杂。这尤其成问题，因为许多机器学习从业者并不精通分布式系统的设计，更不用说那些具有复杂通信拓扑的系统了。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 Launchpad，这是一种编程模型，可以简化定义和启动专门针对机器学习受众定制的分布式系统的过程。我们描述了我们的框架、其设计理念和实现，并给出了许多常见学习算法的示例，这些算法的设计通过这种方法大大简化。 本文介绍了一种名为Launchpad的编程模型，旨在简化分布式机器学习系统的开发。 Fan Yang,Gabriel Barth-Maron,Piotr Stańczyk,Matthew Hoffman,Siqi Liu,Manuel Kroiss,Aedan Pope,Alban Rrustemi cs.DC,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Sharmin Pathan,Vyom Shrivastava
title: Identifying Linked Fraudulent Activities Using GraphConvolution Network
title_zh: 使用 GraphConvolution 网络识别关联的欺诈活动
abstract: In this paper, we present a novel approach to identify linked fraudulent activities or actors sharing similar attributes, using Graph Convolution Network (GCN). These linked fraudulent activities can be visualized as graphs with abstract concepts like relationships and interactions, which makes GCNs an ideal solution to identify the graph edges which serve as links between fraudulent nodes. Traditional approaches like community detection require strong links between fraudulent attempts like shared attributes to find communities and the supervised solutions require large amount of training data which may not be available in fraud scenarios and work best to provide binary separation between fraudulent and non fraudulent activities. Our approach overcomes the drawbacks of traditional methods as GCNs simply learn similarities between fraudulent nodes to identify clusters of similar attempts and require much smaller dataset to learn. We demonstrate our results on linked accounts with both strong and weak links to identify fraud rings with high confidence. Our results outperform label propagation community detection and supervised GBTs algorithms in terms of solution quality and computation time.
summary: In this paper, we present a novel approach to identify linked fraudulent activities or actors sharing similar attributes, using Graph Convolution Network (GCN). These linked fraudulent activities can be visualized as graphs with abstract concepts like relationships and interactions, which makes GCNs an ideal solution to identify the graph edges which serve as links between fraudulent nodes. Traditional approaches like community detection require strong links between fraudulent attempts like shared attributes to find communities and the supervised solutions require large amount of training data which may not be available in fraud scenarios and work best to provide binary separation between fraudulent and non fraudulent activities. Our approach overcomes the drawbacks of traditional methods as GCNs simply learn similarities between fraudulent nodes to identify clusters of similar attempts and require much smaller dataset to learn. We demonstrate our results on linked accounts with both strong and weak links to identify fraud rings with high confidence. Our results outperform label propagation community detection and supervised GBTs algorithms in terms of solution quality and computation time.
abstract_zh: In this paper, we present a novel approach to identify linked fraudulent activities or actors sharing similar attributes, using Graph Convolution Network (GCN).这些链接的欺诈活动可以可视化为具有关系和交互等抽象概念的图形，这使得 GCN 成为识别充当欺诈节点之间链接的图形边缘的理想解决方案。社区检测等传统方法需要欺诈尝试（例如寻找社区的共享属性）之间存在强有力的联系，而监督解决方案需要大量的训练数据，而这些数据在欺诈场景中可能无法获得，并且最好能够提供欺诈和非欺诈活动之间的二元分离。 Our approach overcomes the drawbacks of traditional methods as GCNs simply learn similarities between fraudulent nodes to identify clusters of similar attempts and require much smaller dataset to learn.我们在具有强链接和弱链接的关联帐户上展示了我们的结果，以高置信度地识别欺诈团伙。我们的结果在解决方案质量和计算时间方面优于标签传播社区检测和监督 GBT 算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图卷积网络（GCN）的新方法，用于识别具有相似属性的关联欺诈活动或参与者。
AI.motivation: 传统社区检测方法依赖强链接和共享属性，监督学习方法需要大量标注数据，而欺诈场景中数据通常稀缺且难以获取。
AI.method: 利用图卷积网络（GCN）学习欺诈节点间的相似性，通过图结构建模关系并识别欺诈集群，无需依赖强链接或大量训练数据。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在识别强弱链接账户的欺诈团伙时，准确率优于标签传播算法和监督GBDT模型，且计算效率更高。
AI.conclusion: GCN方法能有效利用图结构特征和少量数据识别欺诈集群，为欺诈检测提供了更高效且数据需求更低的解决方案。

authors_text: Deepak Kumar,Patrick Gage Kelley,Sunny Consolvo,Joshua Mason,Elie Bursztein,Zakir Durumeric,Kurt Thomas,Michael Bailey
title: Designing Toxic Content Classification for a Diversity of Perspectives
title_zh: 为多种视角设计有毒内容分类
abstract: In this work, we demonstrate how existing classifiers for identifying toxic comments online fail to generalize to the diverse concerns of Internet users. We survey 17,280 participants to understand how user expectations for what constitutes toxic content differ across demographics, beliefs, and personal experiences. We find that groups historically at-risk of harassment - such as people who identify as LGBTQ+ or young adults - are more likely to to flag a random comment drawn from Reddit, Twitter, or 4chan as toxic, as are people who have personally experienced harassment in the past. Based on our findings, we show how current one-size-fits-all toxicity classification algorithms, like the Perspective API from Jigsaw, can improve in accuracy by 86% on average through personalized model tuning. Ultimately, we highlight current pitfalls and new design directions that can improve the equity and efficacy of toxic content classifiers for all users.
summary: In this work, we demonstrate how existing classifiers for identifying toxic comments online fail to generalize to the diverse concerns of Internet users. We survey 17,280 participants to understand how user expectations for what constitutes toxic content differ across demographics, beliefs, and personal experiences. We find that groups historically at-risk of harassment - such as people who identify as LGBTQ+ or young adults - are more likely to to flag a random comment drawn from Reddit, Twitter, or 4chan as toxic, as are people who have personally experienced harassment in the past. Based on our findings, we show how current one-size-fits-all toxicity classification algorithms, like the Perspective API from Jigsaw, can improve in accuracy by 86% on average through personalized model tuning. Ultimately, we highlight current pitfalls and new design directions that can improve the equity and efficacy of toxic content classifiers for all users.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们展示了现有的用于识别在线有毒评论的分类器如何无法概括互联网用户的不同担忧。我们对 17,280 名参与者进行了调查，以了解用户对有毒内容的期望在人口统计、信仰和个人经历方面有何不同。我们发现，历史上面临骚扰风险的群体（例如 LGBTQ+ 群体或年轻人）更有可能将 Reddit、Twitter 或 4chan 上的随机评论标记为有毒评论，过去亲身经历过骚扰的人也是如此。根据我们的研究结果，我们展示了当前一刀切的毒性分类算法（例如 Jigsaw 的 Perspective API）如何通过个性化模型调整将准确度平均提高 86%。最后，我们强调当前的陷阱和新的设计方向，可以提高有毒内容分类器对所有用户的公平性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在改进现有有毒内容分类器，使其能够适应互联网用户的多样化需求，提升分类准确性和公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有分类器无法适应不同用户群体对有毒内容的多样化定义，导致特定群体（如LGBTQ+、年轻人）更易误判内容。
AI.method: 通过调查17,280名用户，分析不同人口统计学特征、信仰及经历对有毒内容定义的影响，并基于结果优化现有算法。
AI.result: 个性化模型调整使现有算法（如Perspective API）平均准确率提升86%。
AI.conclusion: 当前分类器存在公平性缺陷，需通过个性化设计改进，以满足多元用户需求并提升分类效果。

authors_text: Saehanseul Yi,Tae-Wook Kim,Jong-Chan Kim,Nikil Dutt
title: Energy-Efficient Adaptive System Reconfiguration for Dynamic Deadlines in Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 自动驾驶动态期限内的节能自适应系统重新配置
abstract: The increasing computing demands of autonomous driving applications make energy optimizations critical for reducing battery capacity and vehicle weight. Current energy optimization methods typically target traditional real-time systems with static deadlines, resulting in conservative energy savings that are unable to exploit additional energy optimizations due to dynamic deadlines arising from the vehicle's change in velocity and driving context. We present an adaptive system optimization and reconfiguration approach that dynamically adapts the scheduling parameters and processor speeds to satisfy dynamic deadlines while consuming as little energy as possible. Our experimental results with an autonomous driving task set from Bosch and real-world driving data show energy reductions up to 46.4% on average in typical dynamic driving scenarios compared with traditional static energy optimization methods, demonstrating great potential for dynamic energy optimization gains by exploiting dynamic deadlines.
summary: The increasing computing demands of autonomous driving applications make energy optimizations critical for reducing battery capacity and vehicle weight. Current energy optimization methods typically target traditional real-time systems with static deadlines, resulting in conservative energy savings that are unable to exploit additional energy optimizations due to dynamic deadlines arising from the vehicle's change in velocity and driving context. We present an adaptive system optimization and reconfiguration approach that dynamically adapts the scheduling parameters and processor speeds to satisfy dynamic deadlines while consuming as little energy as possible. Our experimental results with an autonomous driving task set from Bosch and real-world driving data show energy reductions up to 46.4% on average in typical dynamic driving scenarios compared with traditional static energy optimization methods, demonstrating great potential for dynamic energy optimization gains by exploiting dynamic deadlines.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶应用不断增长的计算需求使得能源优化对于减少电池容量和车辆重量至关重要。当前的能量优化方法通常针对具有静态期限的传统实时系统，导致保守的节能，而由于车辆速度和驾驶环境的变化而产生动态期限，因此无法利用额外的能量优化。我们提出了一种自适应系统优化和重新配置方法，可以动态调整调度参数和处理器速度以满足动态期限，同时消耗尽可能少的能量。我们对博世自动驾驶任务集和实际驾驶数据的实验结果表明，与传统的静态能量优化方法相比，在典型的动态驾驶场景中平均能量减少高达 46.4%，这表明通过利用动态期限获得动态能量优化收益的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向自动驾驶的动态截止期限自适应系统重构方法，通过动态调整调度参数和处理器速度实现节能优化。
AI.motivation: 现有静态截止期限的节能方法无法适应自动驾驶中因速度和场景变化导致的动态截止期限，造成能源优化潜力未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: 设计动态自适应系统优化框架，根据实时驾驶状态动态调整任务调度参数与处理器频率以满足动态截止期限并最小化能耗。
AI.result: 基于博世自动驾驶任务集和真实驾驶数据的实验显示，在典型动态场景下相比传统静态优化方法平均节能46.4%。
AI.conclusion: 动态截止期限优化方法能显著提升自动驾驶系统的能源效率，验证了动态调整策略在应对复杂驾驶场景中的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种面向自动驾驶的动态截止期限自适应系统重构方法，通过动态调整调度参数和处理器速度实现节能优化。

ai_content.result: 基于博世自动驾驶任务集和真实驾驶数据的实验显示，在典型动态场景下相比传统静态优化方法平均节能46.4%。

ai_content_json.method: 设计动态自适应系统优化框架，根据实时驾驶状态动态调整任务调度参数与处理器频率以满足动态截止期限并最小化能耗。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 动态截止期限优化方法能显著提升自动驾驶系统的能源效率，验证了动态调整策略在应对复杂驾驶场景中的有效性。

tldr: 本文提出一种面向自动驾驶的动态截止期限自适应系统重构方法，通过动态调整调度参数和处理器速度实现节能优化。
motivation: 现有静态截止期限的节能方法无法适应自动驾驶中因速度和场景变化导致的动态截止期限，造成能源优化潜力未被充分挖掘。
method: 设计动态自适应系统优化框架，根据实时驾驶状态动态调整任务调度参数与处理器频率以满足动态截止期限并最小化能耗。
result: 基于博世自动驾驶任务集和真实驾驶数据的实验显示，在典型动态场景下相比传统静态优化方法平均节能46.4%。

search_text: Energy-Efficient Adaptive System Reconfiguration for Dynamic Deadlines in Autonomous Driving 自动驾驶动态期限内的节能自适应系统重新配置 The increasing computing demands of autonomous driving applications make energy optimizations critical for reducing battery capacity and vehicle weight. Current energy optimization methods typically target traditional real-time systems with static deadlines, resulting in conservative energy savings that are unable to exploit additional energy optimizations due to dynamic deadlines arising from the vehicle's change in velocity and driving context. We present an adaptive system optimization and reconfiguration approach that dynamically adapts the scheduling parameters and processor speeds to satisfy dynamic deadlines while consuming as little energy as possible. Our experimental results with an autonomous driving task set from Bosch and real-world driving data show energy reductions up to 46.4% on average in typical dynamic driving scenarios compared with traditional static energy optimization methods, demonstrating great potential for dynamic energy optimization gains by exploiting dynamic deadlines. 自动驾驶应用不断增长的计算需求使得能源优化对于减少电池容量和车辆重量至关重要。当前的能量优化方法通常针对具有静态期限的传统实时系统，导致保守的节能，而由于车辆速度和驾驶环境的变化而产生动态期限，因此无法利用额外的能量优化。我们提出了一种自适应系统优化和重新配置方法，可以动态调整调度参数和处理器速度以满足动态期限，同时消耗尽可能少的能量。我们对博世自动驾驶任务集和实际驾驶数据的实验结果表明，与传统的静态能量优化方法相比，在典型的动态驾驶场景中平均能量减少高达 46.4%，这表明通过利用动态期限获得动态能量优化收益的巨大潜力。 本文提出一种面向自动驾驶的动态截止期限自适应系统重构方法，通过动态调整调度参数和处理器速度实现节能优化。 Saehanseul Yi,Tae-Wook Kim,Jong-Chan Kim,Nikil Dutt math.OC,cs.RO

authors_text: Mikhail Khodak,Renbo Tu,Tian Li,Liam Li,Maria-Florina Balcan,Virginia Smith,Ameet Talwalkar
title: Federated Hyperparameter Tuning: Challenges, Baselines, and Connections to Weight-Sharing
title_zh: 联合超参数调优：挑战、基线以及与权重共享的联系
abstract: Tuning hyperparameters is a crucial but arduous part of the machine learning pipeline. Hyperparameter optimization is even more challenging in federated learning, where models are learned over a distributed network of heterogeneous devices; here, the need to keep data on device and perform local training makes it difficult to efficiently train and evaluate configurations. In this work, we investigate the problem of federated hyperparameter tuning. We first identify key challenges and show how standard approaches may be adapted to form baselines for the federated setting. Then, by making a novel connection to the neural architecture search technique of weight-sharing, we introduce a new method, FedEx, to accelerate federated hyperparameter tuning that is applicable to widely-used federated optimization methods such as FedAvg and recent variants. Theoretically, we show that a FedEx variant correctly tunes the on-device learning rate in the setting of online convex optimization across devices. Empirically, we show that FedEx can outperform natural baselines for federated hyperparameter tuning by several percentage points on the Shakespeare, FEMNIST, and CIFAR-10 benchmarks, obtaining higher accuracy using the same training budget.
summary: Tuning hyperparameters is a crucial but arduous part of the machine learning pipeline. Hyperparameter optimization is even more challenging in federated learning, where models are learned over a distributed network of heterogeneous devices; here, the need to keep data on device and perform local training makes it difficult to efficiently train and evaluate configurations. In this work, we investigate the problem of federated hyperparameter tuning. We first identify key challenges and show how standard approaches may be adapted to form baselines for the federated setting. Then, by making a novel connection to the neural architecture search technique of weight-sharing, we introduce a new method, FedEx, to accelerate federated hyperparameter tuning that is applicable to widely-used federated optimization methods such as FedAvg and recent variants. Theoretically, we show that a FedEx variant correctly tunes the on-device learning rate in the setting of online convex optimization across devices. Empirically, we show that FedEx can outperform natural baselines for federated hyperparameter tuning by several percentage points on the Shakespeare, FEMNIST, and CIFAR-10 benchmarks, obtaining higher accuracy using the same training budget.
abstract_zh: 调整超参数是机器学习流程中至关重要但艰巨的部分。超参数优化在联邦学习中更具挑战性，其中模型是通过异构设备的分布式网络学习的；在这里，需要在设备上保存数据并执行本地训练，这使得高效训练和评估配置变得困难。在这项工作中，我们研究了联合超参数调整的问题。我们首先确定关键挑战，并展示如何调整标准方法来形成联邦设置的基线。然后，通过与权重共享的神经架构搜索技术建立新颖的联系，我们引入了一种新方法 FedEx 来加速联邦超参数调整，该方法适用于广泛使用的联邦优化方法，例如 FedAvg 和最新的变体。从理论上讲，我们表明 FedEx 变体在跨设备的在线凸优化设置中可以正确调整设备上的学习率。根据经验，我们表明，在 Shakespeare、FEMNIST 和 CIFAR-10 基准上，FedEx 的联合超参数调整的性能比自然基线高出几个百分点，从而使用相同的训练预算获得更高的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究联邦学习中的超参数调优问题，提出FedEx方法以提升效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中数据分布异构且需本地训练，导致超参数调优困难，传统方法效率低下，需新方法解决。
AI.method: 提出FedEx方法，结合权重共享技术，加速联邦超参数调优，适用于FedAvg等优化方法，并在在线凸优化场景中证明其正确性。
AI.result: FedEx在多个基准测试中优于自然基线，准确率提升数个百分点，且训练预算相同。
AI.conclusion: FedEx有效解决联邦超参数调优挑战，通过权重共享提升效率，理论与实验验证其有效性，为未来研究提供方向。

authors_text: Vyacheslav Alipov,Riley Simmons-Edler,Nikita Putintsev,Pavel Kalinin,Dmitry Vetrov
title: Towards Practical Credit Assignment for Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 深度强化学习的实用学分分配
abstract: Credit assignment is a fundamental problem in reinforcement learning, the problem of measuring an action's influence on future rewards. Explicit credit assignment methods have the potential to boost the performance of RL algorithms on many tasks, but thus far remain impractical for general use. Recently, a family of methods called Hindsight Credit Assignment (HCA) was proposed, which explicitly assign credit to actions in hindsight based on the probability of the action having led to an observed outcome. This approach has appealing properties, but remains a largely theoretical idea applicable to a limited set of tabular RL tasks. Moreover, it is unclear how to extend HCA to deep RL environments. In this work, we explore the use of HCA-style credit in a deep RL context. We first describe the limitations of existing HCA algorithms in deep RL that lead to their poor performance or complete lack of training, then propose several theoretically-justified modifications to overcome them. We explore the quantitative and qualitative effects of the resulting algorithm on the Arcade Learning Environment (ALE) benchmark, and observe that it improves performance over Advantage Actor-Critic (A2C) on many games where non-trivial credit assignment is necessary to achieve high scores and where hindsight probabilities can be accurately estimated.
summary: Credit assignment is a fundamental problem in reinforcement learning, the problem of measuring an action's influence on future rewards. Explicit credit assignment methods have the potential to boost the performance of RL algorithms on many tasks, but thus far remain impractical for general use. Recently, a family of methods called Hindsight Credit Assignment (HCA) was proposed, which explicitly assign credit to actions in hindsight based on the probability of the action having led to an observed outcome. This approach has appealing properties, but remains a largely theoretical idea applicable to a limited set of tabular RL tasks. Moreover, it is unclear how to extend HCA to deep RL environments. In this work, we explore the use of HCA-style credit in a deep RL context. We first describe the limitations of existing HCA algorithms in deep RL that lead to their poor performance or complete lack of training, then propose several theoretically-justified modifications to overcome them. We explore the quantitative and qualitative effects of the resulting algorithm on the Arcade Learning Environment (ALE) benchmark, and observe that it improves performance over Advantage Actor-Critic (A2C) on many games where non-trivial credit assignment is necessary to achieve high scores and where hindsight probabilities can be accurately estimated.
abstract_zh: 信用分配是强化学习中的一个基本问题，即衡量行动对未来奖励的影响的问题。显式的信用分配方法有可能提高强化学习算法在许多任务上的性能，但迄今为止对于一般用途来说仍然不切实际。最近，提出了一系列称为事后信用分配（HCA）的方法，该方法根据行动导致观察到的结果的概率，明确地将信用分配给事后行动。这种方法具有吸引人的特性，但在很大程度上仍然是一个适用于有限的表格强化学习任务集的理论想法。此外，目前还不清楚如何将 HCA 扩展到深度 RL 环境。在这项工作中，我们探索了 HCA 式信用在深度强化学习环境中的使用。我们首先描述深度强化学习中现有 HCA 算法的局限性，这些局限性导致其性能不佳或完全缺乏训练，然后提出一些理论上合理的修改来克服这些局限性。我们探索了所得算法对 Arcade Learning Environment (ALE) 基准的定量和定性影响，并观察到它在许多游戏中比 Advantage Actor-Critic (A2C) 提高了性能，在这些游戏中，需要进行重要的信用分配才能获得高分，并且可以准确估计事后概率。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在将显式信用分配方法（HCA）应用于深度强化学习，解决其在复杂环境中的实用性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有HCA方法在深度强化学习中表现不佳，难以训练或完全失效，且缺乏对复杂环境的扩展能力。
AI.method: 分析HCA在深度RL中的局限性，并提出理论支持的改进方法，通过调整信用分配机制以适应深度神经网络的训练过程。
AI.result: 改进后的算法在ALE基准测试中优于A2C，在需要复杂信用分配的游戏上取得更高分数。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了HCA在深度RL中的关键问题，为显式信用分配的实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Xiaocheng Tang,Zhiwei Qin,Fan Zhang,Zhaodong Wang,Zhe Xu,Yintai Ma,Hongtu Zhu,Jieping Ye
title: A Deep Value-network Based Approach for Multi-Driver Order Dispatching
title_zh: 基于深度价值网络的多司机订单调度方法
abstract: Recent works on ride-sharing order dispatching have highlighted the importance of taking into account both the spatial and temporal dynamics in the dispatching process for improving the transportation system efficiency. At the same time, deep reinforcement learning has advanced to the point where it achieves superhuman performance in a number of fields. In this work, we propose a deep reinforcement learning based solution for order dispatching and we conduct large scale online A/B tests on DiDi's ride-dispatching platform to show that the proposed method achieves significant improvement on both total driver income and user experience related metrics. In particular, we model the ride dispatching problem as a Semi Markov Decision Process to account for the temporal aspect of the dispatching actions. To improve the stability of the value iteration with nonlinear function approximators like neural networks, we propose Cerebellar Value Networks (CVNet) with a novel distributed state representation layer. We further derive a regularized policy evaluation scheme for CVNet that penalizes large Lipschitz constant of the value network for additional robustness against adversarial perturbation and noises. Finally, we adapt various transfer learning methods to CVNet for increased learning adaptability and efficiency across multiple cities. We conduct extensive offline simulations based on real dispatching data as well as online AB tests through the DiDi's platform. Results show that CVNet consistently outperforms other recently proposed dispatching methods. We finally show that the performance can be further improved through the efficient use of transfer learning.

At the same time, deep reinforcement learning has advanced to the point where it achieves superhuman performance in a number of fields. In this work, we propose a deep reinforcement learning based solution for order dispatching and we conduct large scale online A/B tests on DiDi's ride-dispatching platform to show that the proposed method achieves significant improvement on both total driver income and user experience related metrics. In particular, we model the ride dispatching problem as a Semi Markov Decision Process to account for the temporal aspect of the dispatching actions. To improve the stability of the value iteration with nonlinear function approximators like neural networks, we propose Cerebellar Value Networks (CVNet) with a novel distributed state representation layer. We further derive a regularized policy evaluation scheme for CVNet that penalizes large Lipschitz constant of the value network for additional robustness against adversarial perturbation and noises. Finally, we adapt various transfer learning methods to CVNet for increased learning adaptability and efficiency across multiple cities. We conduct extensive offline simulations based on real dispatching data as well as online AB tests through the DiDi's platform. Results show that CVNet consistently outperforms other recently proposed dispatching methods. We finally show that the performance can be further improved through the efficient use of transfer learning.
abstract_zh: 最近关于拼车订单调度的研究强调了在调度过程中考虑空间和时间动态对于提高交通系统效率的重要性。与此同时，深度强化学习已经发展到在许多领域实现超人表现的程度。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于深度强化学习的订单调度解决方案，并在滴滴的乘车调度平台上进行了大规模在线 A/B 测试，结果表明，所提出的方法在司机总收入和用户体验相关指标方面均取得了显着改善。特别是，我们将乘车调度问题建模为半马尔可夫决策过程，以考虑调度操作的时间方面。为了提高神经网络等非线性函数逼近器的值迭代的稳定性，我们提出了具有新颖的分布式状态表示层的小脑价值网络（CVNet）。我们进一步推导了 CVNet 的正则化策略评估方案，该方案对价值网络的大 Lipschitz 常数进行惩罚，以提高对抗性扰动和噪声的鲁棒性。最后，我们将各种迁移学习方法应用于 CVNet，以提高跨多个城市的学习适应性和效率。我们根据真实的调度数据进行广泛的离线模拟，并通过滴滴平台进行在线AB测试。结果表明，CVNet 始终优于其他最近提出的调度方法。我们最终表明，通过有效使用迁移学习可以进一步提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度价值网络的多司机订单分配方法，通过建模时空动态和改进价值网络稳定性，提升网约车平台效率。
AI.motivation: 现有订单分配方法未能充分结合时空动态特性，而深度强化学习在复杂决策中表现优异，需探索其在多司机场景中的应用以优化收入与用户体验。
AI.method: 将订单分配建模为半马尔可夫决策过程，设计Cerebellar Value Networks（CVNet）并引入分布式状态表示层，结合正则化策略评估与迁移学习提升鲁棒性与跨城市适应性。
AI.result: 基于真实数据的离线仿真和滴滴平台在线A/B测试表明，CVNet在司机收入及用户体验指标上显著优于现有方法，迁移学习进一步提升性能。
AI.conclusion: CVNet通过时空建模与网络优化有效解决多司机订单分配问题，迁移学习策略为跨城市部署提供高效解决方案，验证了深度强化学习在实际交通系统的应用价值。

authors_text: Yohei Kawaguchi,Keisuke Imoto,Yuma Koizumi,Noboru Harada,Daisuke Niizumi,Kota Dohi,Ryo Tanabe,Harsh Purohit,Takashi Endo
title: Description and Discussion on DCASE 2021 Challenge Task 2: Unsupervised Anomalous Sound Detection for Machine Condition Monitoring under Domain Shifted Conditions
title_zh: DCASE 2021挑战任务2：域转移条件下机器状态监测的无监督异常声音检测的描述和讨论
abstract: We present the task description and discussion on the results of the DCASE 2021 Challenge Task 2. In 2020, we organized an unsupervised anomalous sound detection (ASD) task, identifying whether a given sound was normal or anomalous without anomalous training data. In 2021, we organized an advanced unsupervised ASD task under domain-shift conditions, which focuses on the inevitable problem of the practical use of ASD systems. The main challenge of this task is to detect unknown anomalous sounds where the acoustic characteristics of the training and testing samples are different, i.e., domain-shifted. This problem frequently occurs due to changes in seasons, manufactured products, and/or environmental noise. We received 75 submissions from 26 teams, and several novel approaches have been developed in this challenge. On the basis of the analysis of the evaluation results, we found that there are two types of remarkable approaches that TOP-5 winning teams adopted: 1) ensemble approaches of ``outlier exposure'' (OE)-based detectors and ``inlier modeling'' (IM)-based detectors and 2) approaches based on IM-based detection for features learned in a machine-identification task.
summary: We present the task description and discussion on the results of the DCASE 2021 Challenge Task 2. In 2020, we organized an unsupervised anomalous sound detection (ASD) task, identifying whether a given sound was normal or anomalous without anomalous training data. In 2021, we organized an advanced unsupervised ASD task under domain-shift conditions, which focuses on the inevitable problem of the practical use of ASD systems. The main challenge of this task is to detect unknown anomalous sounds where the acoustic characteristics of the training and testing samples are different, i.e., domain-shifted. This problem frequently occurs due to changes in seasons, manufactured products, and/or environmental noise. We received 75 submissions from 26 teams, and several novel approaches have been developed in this challenge. On the basis of the analysis of the evaluation results, we found that there are two types of remarkable approaches that TOP-5 winning teams adopted: 1) ensemble approaches of ``outlier exposure'' (OE)-based detectors and ``inlier modeling'' (IM)-based detectors and 2) approaches based on IM-based detection for features learned in a machine-identification task.
abstract_zh: 我们对 DCASE 2021 挑战任务 2 的结果进行了任务描述和讨论。2020 年，我们组织了一项无监督异常声音检测（ASD）任务，在没有异常训练数据的情况下识别给定声音是正常还是异常。 2021年，我们组织了域转移条件下的高级无监督ASD任务，重点关注ASD系统实际使用中不可避免的问题。这项任务的主要挑战是检测未知的异常声音，其中训练样本和测试样本的声学特征不同，即域转移。由于季节、制造产品和/或环境噪音的变化，该问题经常发生。我们收到了来自 26 个团队的 75 份提交材料，并且在这项挑战中开发了几种新颖的方法。根据对评估结果的分析，我们发现 TOP-5 获胜团队采用了两种类型的显着方法：1）基于“离群暴露”（OE）的检测器和基于“内点建模”（IM）的检测器的集成方法；2）基于 IM 检测的方法，用于在机器识别任务中学习到的特征。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了DCASE 2021挑战赛任务2的描述与结果讨论，重点研究了在领域偏移条件下进行无监督异常声音检测（ASD）的挑战。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中，ASD系统常面临训练数据与测试数据声学特征差异（领域偏移）的问题，需开发鲁棒的检测方法以应对季节变化、产品差异或环境噪声等影响。
AI.method: 参赛团队采用两种主要方法：1) 结合基于异常暴露（OE）和内例建模（IM）的检测器的集成方法；2) 基于机器识别任务学习特征的IM检测方法。
AI.result: 共收到26支队伍的75次提交，分析显示前五名团队主要采用上述两种方法，验证了其在领域偏移场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 集成OE与IM方法及基于机器识别特征的IM方法在领域偏移ASD任务中表现突出，未来需进一步优化以提升实际应用的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Jiapeng Zhu,Ruili Feng,Yujun Shen,Deli Zhao,Zhengjun Zha,Jingren Zhou,Qifeng Chen
title: Low-Rank Subspaces in GANs
title_zh: GAN 中的低阶子空间
abstract: The latent space of a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) has been shown to encode rich semantics within some subspaces. To identify these subspaces, researchers typically analyze the statistical information from a collection of synthesized data, and the identified subspaces tend to control image attributes globally (i.e., manipulating an attribute causes the change of an entire image). By contrast, this work introduces low-rank subspaces that enable more precise control of GAN generation. Concretely, given an arbitrary image and a region of interest (e.g., eyes of face images), we manage to relate the latent space to the image region with the Jacobian matrix and then use low-rank factorization to discover steerable latent subspaces. There are three distinguishable strengths of our approach that can be aptly called LowRankGAN. First, compared to analytic algorithms in prior work, our low-rank factorization of Jacobians is able to find the low-dimensional representation of attribute manifold, making image editing more precise and controllable. Second, low-rank factorization naturally yields a null space of attributes such that moving the latent code within it only affects the outer region of interest. Therefore, local image editing can be simply achieved by projecting an attribute vector into the null space without relying on a spatial mask as existing methods do. Third, our method can robustly work with a local region from one image for analysis yet well generalize to other images, making it much easy to use in practice. Extensive experiments on state-of-the-art GAN models (including StyleGAN2 and BigGAN) trained on various datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our LowRankGAN.

Concretely, given an arbitrary image and a region of interest (e.g., eyes of face images), we manage to relate the latent space to the image region with the Jacobian matrix and then use low-rank factorization to discover steerable latent subspaces. There are three distinguishable strengths of our approach that can be aptly called LowRankGAN. First, compared to analytic algorithms in prior work, our low-rank factorization of Jacobians is able to find the low-dimensional representation of attribute manifold, making image editing more precise and controllable. Second, low-rank factorization naturally yields a null space of attributes such that moving the latent code within it only affects the outer region of interest. Therefore, local image editing can be simply achieved by projecting an attribute vector into the null space without relying on a spatial mask as existing methods do. Third, our method can robustly work with a local region from one image for analysis yet well generalize to other images, making it much easy to use in practice. abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）的潜在空间已被证明可以在某些子空间内编码丰富的语义。为了识别这些子空间，研究人员通常分析来自合成数据集合的统计信息，并且所识别的子空间倾向于全局控制图像属性（即，操纵属性会导致整个图像的变化）。相比之下，这项工作引入了低秩子空间，可以更精确地控制 GAN 的生成。具体来说，给定任意图像和感兴趣区域（例如，人脸图像的眼睛），我们设法使用雅可比矩阵将潜在空间与图像区域联系起来，然后使用低秩分解来发现可操纵的潜在子空间。我们的方法具有三个显着的优势，可以恰当地称为 LowRankGAN。首先，与先前工作中的解析算法相比，我们的雅可比行列式低阶分解能够找到属性流形的低维表示，使得图像编辑更加精确和可控。其次，低秩分解自然会产生属性的零空间，使得在其中移动潜在代码仅影响外部感兴趣区域。因此，可以通过将属性向量投影到零空间来简单地实现局部图像编辑，而不需要像现有方法那样依赖空间掩模。第三，我们的方法可以稳健地处理一幅图像中的局部区域进行分析，并且可以很好地推广到其他图像，使其在实践中非常易于使用。在各种数据集上训练的最先进的 GAN 模型（包括 StyleGAN2 和 BigGAN）的大量实验证明了我们的 LowRankGAN 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LowRankGAN方法，通过低秩子空间实现对生成对抗网络（GAN）图像生成的精确局部控制。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN子空间方法只能全局控制图像属性，无法实现精确的局部编辑，且依赖空间掩码限制编辑区域。
AI.method: 利用雅可比矩阵建立潜在空间与图像区域的关联，通过低秩分解发现可操控的潜在子空间，并提取属性空域实现无掩码的局部编辑。
AI.result: 在StyleGAN2和BigGAN等先进模型上验证，LowRankGAN能实现精确的局部图像编辑，且对不同图像具有良好的泛化性。
AI.conclusion: LowRankGAN通过低秩分解雅可比矩阵，实现了比传统方法更精确、更易用的局部图像编辑方案。

search_text: Low-Rank Subspaces in GANs GAN 中的低阶子空间 The latent space of a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) has been shown to encode rich semantics within some subspaces. To identify these subspaces, researchers typically analyze the statistical information from a collection of synthesized data, and the identified subspaces tend to control image attributes globally (i.e., manipulating an attribute causes the change of an entire image). By contrast, this work introduces low-rank subspaces that enable more precise control of GAN generation. Concretely, given an arbitrary image and a region of interest (e.g., eyes of face images), we manage to relate the latent space to the image region with the Jacobian matrix and then use low-rank factorization to discover steerable latent subspaces. There are three distinguishable strengths of our approach that can be aptly called LowRankGAN. First, compared to analytic algorithms in prior work, our low-rank factorization of Jacobians is able to find the low-dimensional representation of attribute manifold, making image editing more precise and controllable. Second, low-rank factorization naturally yields a null space of attributes such that moving the latent code within it only affects the outer region of interest. Therefore, local image editing can be simply achieved by projecting an attribute vector into the null space without relying on a spatial mask as existing methods do. Third, our method can robustly work with a local region from one image for analysis yet well generalize to other images, making it much easy to use in practice. Extensive experiments on state-of-the-art GAN models (including StyleGAN2 and BigGAN) trained on various datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our LowRankGAN. 生成对抗网络（GAN）的潜在空间已被证明可以在某些子空间内编码丰富的语义。为了识别这些子空间，研究人员通常分析来自合成数据集合的统计信息，并且所识别的子空间倾向于全局控制图像属性（即，操纵属性会导致整个图像的变化）。相比之下，这项工作引入了低秩子空间，可以更精确地控制 GAN 的生成。具体来说，给定任意图像和感兴趣区域（例如，人脸图像的眼睛），我们设法使用雅可比矩阵将潜在空间与图像区域联系起来，然后使用低秩分解来发现可操纵的潜在子空间。我们的方法具有三个显着的优势，可以恰当地称为 LowRankGAN。首先，与先前工作中的解析算法相比，我们的雅可比行列式低阶分解能够找到属性流形的低维表示，使得图像编辑更加精确和可控。其次，低秩分解自然会产生属性的零空间，使得在其中移动潜在代码仅影响外部感兴趣区域。因此，可以通过将属性向量投影到零空间来简单地实现局部图像编辑，而不需要像现有方法那样依赖空间掩模。第三，我们的方法可以稳健地处理一幅图像中的局部区域进行分析，并且可以很好地推广到其他图像，使其在实践中非常易于使用。在各种数据集上训练的最先进的 GAN 模型（包括 StyleGAN2 和 BigGAN）的大量实验证明了我们的 LowRankGAN 的有效性。 本文提出LowRankGAN方法，通过低秩子空间实现对生成对抗网络（GAN）图像生成的精确局部控制。 Jiapeng Zhu,Ruili Feng,Yujun Shen,Deli Zhao,Zhengjun Zha,Jingren Zhou,Qifeng Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Siddharth Bhatia,Mohit Wadhwa,Kenji Kawaguchi,Neil Shah,Philip S. Yu,Bryan Hooi
title: Sketch-Based Anomaly Detection in Streaming Graphs
title_zh: 流图中基于草图的异常检测
comment: Accepted at SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD), 2023
comments: Accepted at SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD), 2023
abstract: Given a stream of graph edges from a dynamic graph, how can we assign anomaly scores to edges and subgraphs in an online manner, for the purpose of detecting unusual behavior, using constant time and memory? For example, in intrusion detection, existing work seeks to detect either anomalous edges or anomalous subgraphs, but not both. In this paper, we first extend the count-min sketch data structure to a higher-order sketch. This higher-order sketch has the useful property of preserving the dense subgraph structure (dense subgraphs in the input turn into dense submatrices in the data structure). We then propose 4 online algorithms that utilize this enhanced data structure, which (a) detect both edge and graph anomalies; (b) process each edge and graph in constant memory and constant update time per newly arriving edge, and; (c) outperform state-of-the-art baselines on 4 real-world datasets. Our method is the first streaming approach that incorporates dense subgraph search to detect graph anomalies in constant memory and time.
summary: Given a stream of graph edges from a dynamic graph, how can we assign anomaly scores to edges and subgraphs in an online manner, for the purpose of detecting unusual behavior, using constant time and memory? For example, in intrusion detection, existing work seeks to detect either anomalous edges or anomalous subgraphs, but not both. In this paper, we first extend the count-min sketch data structure to a higher-order sketch. This higher-order sketch has the useful property of preserving the dense subgraph structure (dense subgraphs in the input turn into dense submatrices in the data structure). We then propose 4 online algorithms that utilize this enhanced data structure, which (a) detect both edge and graph anomalies; (b) process each edge and graph in constant memory and constant update time per newly arriving edge, and; (c) outperform state-of-the-art baselines on 4 real-world datasets. Our method is the first streaming approach that incorporates dense subgraph search to detect graph anomalies in constant memory and time.
abstract_zh: 给定动态图中的图边流，我们如何以在线方式将异常分数分配给边和子图，以便使用恒定的时间和内存检测异常行为？例如，在入侵检测中，现有工作试图检测异常边缘或异常子图，但不能同时检测两者。在本文中，我们首先将计数最小草图数据结构扩展到高阶草图。这个高阶草图具有保留稠密子图结构的有用属性（输入中的稠密子图变成数据结构中的稠密子矩阵）。然后，我们提出了 4 种利用这种增强数据结构的在线算法，它们 (a) 检测边缘和图形异常； (b) 在恒定内存中处理每条边和图，并且每个新到达的边的更新时间恒定； (c) 在 4 个真实世界数据集上优于最先进的基线。我们的方法是第一个结合密集子图搜索来检测恒定内存和时间中的图异常的流式方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高阶草图的流图异常检测方法，能够在常数时间和内存下同时检测边和子图异常。
AI.motivation: 现有流图异常检测方法无法同时高效检测边异常和子图异常，且难以在资源受限环境下处理动态图数据。
AI.method: 扩展count-min草图结构为高阶草图以保留密集子图特征，并设计4种在线算法实现常数时间/内存的异常检测。
AI.result: 在4个真实数据集上优于现有方法，首次实现流式场景下结合密集子图搜索的常数资源异常检测。
AI.conclusion: 通过高阶草图结构创新，提出了兼顾效率与精度的流图异常检测框架，为动态图分析提供了新思路。

ai_content.result: 在4个真实数据集上优于现有方法，首次实现流式场景下结合密集子图搜索的常数资源异常检测。

authors_text: Daniel Rosenberg,Itai Gat,Amir Feder,Roi Reichart
title: Are VQA Systems RAD? Measuring Robustness to Augmented Data with Focused Interventions
title_zh: VQA 系统是 RAD 吗？通过有针对性的干预来衡量增强数据的稳健性
comment: ACL 2021. Our code and data are available at https://danrosenberg.github.io/rad-measure/
comments: ACL 2021. Our code and data are available at https://danrosenberg.github.io/rad-measure/
abstract: Deep learning algorithms have shown promising results in visual question answering (VQA) tasks, but a more careful look reveals that they often do not understand the rich signal they are being fed with. To understand and better measure the generalization capabilities of VQA systems, we look at their robustness to counterfactually augmented data. Our proposed augmentations are designed to make a focused intervention on a specific property of the question such that the answer changes. Using these augmentations, we propose a new robustness measure, Robustness to Augmented Data (RAD), which measures the consistency of model predictions between original and augmented examples. Through extensive experimentation, we show that RAD, unlike classical accuracy measures, can quantify when state-of-the-art systems are not robust to counterfactuals. We find substantial failure cases which reveal that current VQA systems are still brittle. Finally, we connect between robustness and generalization, demonstrating the predictive power of RAD for performance on unseen augmentations.
summary: Deep learning algorithms have shown promising results in visual question answering (VQA) tasks, but a more careful look reveals that they often do not understand the rich signal they are being fed with. To understand and better measure the generalization capabilities of VQA systems, we look at their robustness to counterfactually augmented data. Our proposed augmentations are designed to make a focused intervention on a specific property of the question such that the answer changes. Using these augmentations, we propose a new robustness measure, Robustness to Augmented Data (RAD), which measures the consistency of model predictions between original and augmented examples. Through extensive experimentation, we show that RAD, unlike classical accuracy measures, can quantify when state-of-the-art systems are not robust to counterfactuals. We find substantial failure cases which reveal that current VQA systems are still brittle. Finally, we connect between robustness and generalization, demonstrating the predictive power of RAD for performance on unseen augmentations.
abstract_zh: 深度学习算法在视觉问答（VQA）任务中显示出了有希望的结果，但更仔细的观察发现，它们通常不理解所输入的丰富信号。为了理解和更好地衡量 VQA 系统的泛化能力，我们研究了它们对反事实增强数据的鲁棒性。我们提出的增强措施旨在对问题的特定属性进行集中干预，从而使答案发生变化。使用这些增强，我们提出了一种新的鲁棒性度量，即增强数据的鲁棒性（RAD），它衡量原始示例和增强示例之间模型预测的一致性。通过广泛的实验，我们表明，与经典的准确性测量不同，RAD 可以在最先进的系统对反事实不稳健的情况下进行量化。我们发现了大量的失败案例，表明当前的 VQA 系统仍然脆弱。最后，我们将鲁棒性和泛化性联系起来，展示了 RAD 对未见增强性能的预测能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RAD的新方法，通过聚焦干预问题属性来评估视觉问答（VQA）系统的鲁棒性，揭示当前系统在对抗性数据下的脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在VQA任务中表现优异，但现有系统可能未真正理解输入信息，导致泛化能力不足。传统准确率指标无法有效衡量系统的鲁棒性，需设计新方法评估其对对抗性数据的稳定性。
AI.method: 通过设计针对问题特定属性的对抗性数据增强方法，使答案发生改变，并基于增强数据与原数据的预测一致性提出鲁棒性指标RAD，结合大量实验验证其有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，当前SOTA VQA系统在对抗性数据下存在显著失效案例，RAD指标能有效量化系统鲁棒性，并预测其在未见过的增强数据上的表现。
AI.conclusion: 现有VQA系统仍存在脆弱性，RAD指标为评估模型鲁棒性与泛化能力提供了新视角，强调了提升模型对抗性鲁棒性的必要性。

search_text: Are VQA Systems RAD? Measuring Robustness to Augmented Data with Focused Interventions VQA 系统是 RAD 吗？通过有针对性的干预来衡量增强数据的稳健性 Deep learning algorithms have shown promising results in visual question answering (VQA) tasks, but a more careful look reveals that they often do not understand the rich signal they are being fed with. To understand and better measure the generalization capabilities of VQA systems, we look at their robustness to counterfactually augmented data. Our proposed augmentations are designed to make a focused intervention on a specific property of the question such that the answer changes. Using these augmentations, we propose a new robustness measure, Robustness to Augmented Data (RAD), which measures the consistency of model predictions between original and augmented examples. Through extensive experimentation, we show that RAD, unlike classical accuracy measures, can quantify when state-of-the-art systems are not robust to counterfactuals. We find substantial failure cases which reveal that current VQA systems are still brittle. Finally, we connect between robustness and generalization, demonstrating the predictive power of RAD for performance on unseen augmentations. 深度学习算法在视觉问答（VQA）任务中显示出了有希望的结果，但更仔细的观察发现，它们通常不理解所输入的丰富信号。为了理解和更好地衡量 VQA 系统的泛化能力，我们研究了它们对反事实增强数据的鲁棒性。我们提出的增强措施旨在对问题的特定属性进行集中干预，从而使答案发生变化。使用这些增强，我们提出了一种新的鲁棒性度量，即增强数据的鲁棒性（RAD），它衡量原始示例和增强示例之间模型预测的一致性。通过广泛的实验，我们表明，与经典的准确性测量不同，RAD 可以在最先进的系统对反事实不稳健的情况下进行量化。我们发现了大量的失败案例，表明当前的 VQA 系统仍然脆弱。最后，我们将鲁棒性和泛化性联系起来，展示了 RAD 对未见增强性能的预测能力。 本文提出了一种名为RAD的新方法，通过聚焦干预问题属性来评估视觉问答（VQA）系统的鲁棒性，揭示当前系统在对抗性数据下的脆弱性。 Daniel Rosenberg,Itai Gat,Amir Feder,Roi Reichart cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Nathan Grinsztajn,Johan Ferret,Olivier Pietquin,Philippe Preux,Matthieu Geist
title: There Is No Turning Back: A Self-Supervised Approach for Reversibility-Aware Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 没有回头路：可逆性感知强化学习的自我监督方法
abstract: We propose to learn to distinguish reversible from irreversible actions for better informed decision-making in Reinforcement Learning (RL). From theoretical considerations, we show that approximate reversibility can be learned through a simple surrogate task: ranking randomly sampled trajectory events in chronological order. Intuitively, pairs of events that are always observed in the same order are likely to be separated by an irreversible sequence of actions. Conveniently, learning the temporal order of events can be done in a fully self-supervised way, which we use to estimate the reversibility of actions from experience, without any priors. We propose two different strategies that incorporate reversibility in RL agents, one strategy for exploration (RAE) and one strategy for control (RAC). We demonstrate the potential of reversibility-aware agents in several environments, including the challenging Sokoban game. In synthetic tasks, we show that we can learn control policies that never fail and reduce to zero the side-effects of interactions, even without access to the reward function.
summary: We propose to learn to distinguish reversible from irreversible actions for better informed decision-making in Reinforcement Learning (RL). From theoretical considerations, we show that approximate reversibility can be learned through a simple surrogate task: ranking randomly sampled trajectory events in chronological order. Intuitively, pairs of events that are always observed in the same order are likely to be separated by an irreversible sequence of actions. Conveniently, learning the temporal order of events can be done in a fully self-supervised way, which we use to estimate the reversibility of actions from experience, without any priors. We propose two different strategies that incorporate reversibility in RL agents, one strategy for exploration (RAE) and one strategy for control (RAC). We demonstrate the potential of reversibility-aware agents in several environments, including the challenging Sokoban game. In synthetic tasks, we show that we can learn control policies that never fail and reduce to zero the side-effects of interactions, even without access to the reward function.
abstract_zh: 我们建议学习区分可逆行为和不可逆行为，以便在强化学习（RL）中做出更明智的决策。从理论上考虑，我们表明可以通过一个简单的代理任务来学习近似可逆性：按时间顺序对随机采样的轨迹事件进行排序。直观上，总是以相同顺序观察到的事件对很可能被不可逆的动作序列分开。方便地，学习事件的时间顺序可以以完全自我监督的方式完成，我们用它来根据经验估计动作的可逆性，而无需任何先验。我们提出了两种不同的策略，将可逆性融入 RL 代理中，一种是探索策略 (RAE)，一种是控制策略 (RAC)。我们展示了可逆感知代理在多种环境中的潜力，包括具有挑战性的推箱子游戏。在综合任务中，我们表明，即使无法访问奖励函数，我们也可以学习永不失败的控制策略，并将交互的副作用减少到零。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督方法，使强化学习智能体能够区分可逆与不可逆动作，以提升决策质量。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在处理不可逆动作时可能引发副作用或失败，需通过区分动作可逆性来增强决策安全性与有效性。
AI.method: 通过自监督任务对轨迹事件进行时间排序，学习动作可逆性；提出两种策略RAE（探索）和RAC（控制）整合可逆性信息。
AI.result: 在合成任务和Sokoban游戏中，智能体能学习到零副作用的控制策略，且无需奖励函数即可实现稳定控制。
AI.conclusion: 可逆性感知强化学习有效提升了决策质量，为安全关键场景提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xuelin Chen,Weiyu Li,Daniel Cohen-Or,Niloy J. Mitra,Baoquan Chen
title: MoCo-Flow: Neural Motion Consensus Flow for Dynamic Humans in Stationary Monocular Cameras
title_zh: MoCo-Flow：固定单目相机中动态人体的神经运动共识流
abstract: Synthesizing novel views of dynamic humans from stationary monocular cameras is a specialized but desirable setup. This is particularly attractive as it does not require static scenes, controlled environments, or specialized capture hardware. In contrast to techniques that exploit multi-view observations, the problem of modeling a dynamic scene from a single view is significantly more under-constrained and ill-posed. In this paper, we introduce Neural Motion Consensus Flow (MoCo-Flow), a representation that models dynamic humans in stationary monocular cameras using a 4D continuous time-variant function. We learn the proposed representation by optimizing for a dynamic scene that minimizes the total rendering error, over all the observed images. At the heart of our work lies a carefully designed optimization scheme, which includes a dedicated initialization step and is constrained by a motion consensus regularization on the estimated motion flow. We extensively evaluate MoCo-Flow on several datasets that contain human motions of varying complexity, and compare, both qualitatively and quantitatively, to several baselines and ablated variations of our methods, showing the efficacy and merits of the proposed approach. Pretrained model, code, and data will be released for research purposes upon paper acceptance.
summary: Synthesizing novel views of dynamic humans from stationary monocular cameras is a specialized but desirable setup. This is particularly attractive as it does not require static scenes, controlled environments, or specialized capture hardware. In contrast to techniques that exploit multi-view observations, the problem of modeling a dynamic scene from a single view is significantly more under-constrained and ill-posed. In this paper, we introduce Neural Motion Consensus Flow (MoCo-Flow), a representation that models dynamic humans in stationary monocular cameras using a 4D continuous time-variant function. We learn the proposed representation by optimizing for a dynamic scene that minimizes the total rendering error, over all the observed images. At the heart of our work lies a carefully designed optimization scheme, which includes a dedicated initialization step and is constrained by a motion consensus regularization on the estimated motion flow. We extensively evaluate MoCo-Flow on several datasets that contain human motions of varying complexity, and compare, both qualitatively and quantitatively, to several baselines and ablated variations of our methods, showing the efficacy and merits of the proposed approach. Pretrained model, code, and data will be released for research purposes upon paper acceptance.
abstract_zh: 从固定的单目相机合成动态人体的新颖视图是一种专门但理想的设置。这是特别有吸引力的，因为它不需要静态场景、受控环境或专门的捕获硬件。与利用多视图观察的技术相比，从单个视图对动态场景进行建模的问题明显更缺乏约束且不适定。在本文中，我们介绍了神经运动共识流（MoCo-Flow），这是一种使用 4D 连续时变函数在固定单目相机中对动态人体进行建模的表示形式。我们通过优化动态场景来学习所提出的表示，从而最大限度地减少所有观察到的图像的总渲染误差。我们工作的核心在于精心设计的优化方案，其中包括专用的初始化步骤，并受到估计运动流的运动一致正则化的约束。我们在包含不同复杂度的人体运动的几个数据集上广泛评估了 MoCo-Flow，并与我们方法的几个基线和消融变体进行定性和定量比较，显示了所提出方法的有效性和优点。论文接受后，将发布预训练的模型、代码和数据以用于研究目的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MoCo-Flow方法，通过单目固定摄像头合成动态人类的新视角图像。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多依赖多视角观测或受控环境，而单目固定摄像头下的动态场景建模存在严重欠约束问题，需探索更实用的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建4D连续时变函数表示动态人类，通过优化总渲染误差并结合运动一致性正则化约束，设计包含专用初始化的优化方案。
AI.result: 在多个复杂度不同的数据集上验证方法有效性，通过定性和定量实验优于基线及消融变体。
AI.conclusion: MoCo-Flow为单目动态人像新视角合成提供了有效解决方案，代码与模型将在论文接收后开源。

We learn the proposed representation by optimizing for a dynamic scene that minimizes the total rendering error, over all the observed images. We extensively evaluate MoCo-Flow on several datasets that contain human motions of varying complexity, and compare, both qualitatively and quantitatively, to several baselines and ablated variations of our methods, showing the efficacy and merits of the proposed approach. Pretrained model, code, and data will be released for research purposes upon paper acceptance. 从固定的单目相机合成动态人体的新颖视图是一种专门但理想的设置。这是特别有吸引力的，因为它不需要静态场景、受控环境或专门的捕获硬件。与利用多视图观察的技术相比，从单个视图对动态场景进行建模的问题明显更缺乏约束且不适定。在本文中，我们介绍了神经运动共识流（MoCo-Flow），这是一种使用 4D 连续时变函数在固定单目相机中对动态人体进行建模的表示形式。我们通过优化动态场景来学习所提出的表示，从而最大限度地减少所有观察到的图像的总渲染误差。我们工作的核心在于精心设计的优化方案，其中包括专用的初始化步骤，并受到估计运动流的运动一致正则化的约束。我们在包含不同复杂度的人体运动的几个数据集上广泛评估了 MoCo-Flow，并与我们方法的几个基线和消融变体进行定性和定量比较，显示了所提出方法的有效性和优点。论文接受后，将发布预训练的模型、代码和数据以用于研究目的。 本文提出MoCo-Flow方法，通过单目固定摄像头合成动态人类的新视角图像。 Xuelin Chen,Weiyu Li,Daniel Cohen-Or,Niloy J. Mitra,Baoquan Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Manli Zhu,Qianhui Men,Edmond S. L. Ho,Howard Leung,Hubert P. H. Shum
title: Interpreting Deep Learning based Cerebral Palsy Prediction with Channel Attention
title_zh: 用通道注意力解释基于深度学习的脑瘫预测
abstract: Early prediction of cerebral palsy is essential as it leads to early treatment and monitoring. Deep learning has shown promising results in biomedical engineering thanks to its capacity of modelling complicated data with its non-linear architecture. However, due to their complex structure, deep learning models are generally not interpretable by humans, making it difficult for clinicians to rely on the findings. In this paper, we propose a channel attention module for deep learning models to predict cerebral palsy from infants' body movements, which highlights the key features (i.e. body joints) the model identifies as important, thereby indicating why certain diagnostic results are found. To highlight the capacity of the deep network in modelling input features, we utilize raw joint positions instead of hand-crafted features. We validate our system with a real-world infant movement dataset. Our proposed channel attention module enables the visualization of the vital joints to this disease that the network considers. Our system achieves 91.67% accuracy, suppressing other state-of-the-art deep learning methods.
summary: Early prediction of cerebral palsy is essential as it leads to early treatment and monitoring. Deep learning has shown promising results in biomedical engineering thanks to its capacity of modelling complicated data with its non-linear architecture. However, due to their complex structure, deep learning models are generally not interpretable by humans, making it difficult for clinicians to rely on the findings. In this paper, we propose a channel attention module for deep learning models to predict cerebral palsy from infants' body movements, which highlights the key features (i.e. body joints) the model identifies as important, thereby indicating why certain diagnostic results are found. To highlight the capacity of the deep network in modelling input features, we utilize raw joint positions instead of hand-crafted features. We validate our system with a real-world infant movement dataset. Our proposed channel attention module enables the visualization of the vital joints to this disease that the network considers. Our system achieves 91.67% accuracy, suppressing other state-of-the-art deep learning methods.
abstract_zh: 脑瘫的早期预测至关重要，因为它有助于早期治疗和监测。深度学习凭借其非线性架构对复杂数据进行建模的能力，在生物医学工程中显示出了可喜的成果。然而，由于其复杂的结构，深度学习模型通常无法被人类解释，这使得临床医生很难依赖其研究结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于深度学习模型的通道注意模块，用于根据婴儿的身体运动来预测脑瘫，该模块突出显示了模型识别为重要的关键特征（即身体关节），从而表明了为什么会发现某些诊断结果。为了突出深度网络在建模输入特征方面的能力，我们利用原始关节位置而不是手工制作的特征。我们使用真实世界的婴儿运动数据集验证我们的系统。我们提出的通道注意力模块可以实现网络考虑的这种疾病的重要关节的可视化。我们的系统达到了 91.67% 的准确率，压制了其他最先进的深度学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于通道注意力机制的深度学习模型，用于通过婴儿身体运动预测脑瘫，并可视化模型关注的关键关节。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在生物医学工程中表现优异，但其复杂结构导致模型不可解释，阻碍了临床医生的信任与应用。需提高模型可解释性以辅助诊断。
AI.method: 设计通道注意力模块，利用原始关节位置数据代替手工特征，自动学习并突出模型认为重要的身体关节特征。
AI.result: 在真实婴儿运动数据集上达到91.67%的准确率，优于其他前沿深度学习方法，并可视化关键关节以辅助诊断。
AI.conclusion: 通道注意力机制有效提升了模型可解释性与预测性能，为脑瘫早期诊断提供了可视化依据，促进临床应用。

authors_text: Sharib Ali,Debesh Jha,Noha Ghatwary,Stefano Realdon,Renato Cannizzaro,Osama E. Salem,Dominique Lamarque,Christian Daul,Michael A. Riegler,Kim V. Anonsen,Andreas Petlund,Pål Halvorsen,Jens Rittscher,Thomas de Lange,James E. East
title: A multi-centre polyp detection and segmentation dataset for generalisability assessment
title_zh: 用于通用性评估的多中心息肉检测和分割数据集
abstract: Polyps in the colon are widely known cancer precursors identified by colonoscopy. Whilst most polyps are benign, the polyp's number, size and surface structure are linked to the risk of colon cancer. Several methods have been developed to automate polyp detection and segmentation. However, the main issue is that they are not tested rigorously on a large multicentre purpose-built dataset, one reason being the lack of a comprehensive public dataset. As a result, the developed methods may not generalise to different population datasets. To this extent, we have curated a dataset from six unique centres incorporating more than 300 patients. The dataset includes both single frame and sequence data with 3762 annotated polyp labels with precise delineation of polyp boundaries verified by six senior gastroenterologists. To our knowledge, this is the most comprehensive detection and pixel-level segmentation dataset (referred to as \textit{PolypGen}) curated by a team of computational scientists and expert gastroenterologists. The paper provides insight into data construction and annotation strategies, quality assurance, and technical validation. Our dataset can be downloaded from \url{ https://doi.org/10.7303/syn26376615}.
summary: Polyps in the colon are widely known cancer precursors identified by colonoscopy. Whilst most polyps are benign, the polyp's number, size and surface structure are linked to the risk of colon cancer. Several methods have been developed to automate polyp detection and segmentation. However, the main issue is that they are not tested rigorously on a large multicentre purpose-built dataset, one reason being the lack of a comprehensive public dataset. As a result, the developed methods may not generalise to different population datasets. To this extent, we have curated a dataset from six unique centres incorporating more than 300 patients. The dataset includes both single frame and sequence data with 3762 annotated polyp labels with precise delineation of polyp boundaries verified by six senior gastroenterologists. To our knowledge, this is the most comprehensive detection and pixel-level segmentation dataset (referred to as \textit{PolypGen}) curated by a team of computational scientists and expert gastroenterologists. The paper provides insight into data construction and annotation strategies, quality assurance, and technical validation. Our dataset can be downloaded from \url{ https://doi.org/10.7303/syn26376615}.
abstract_zh: 结肠息肉是众所周知的通过结肠镜检查发现的癌症前兆。虽然大多数息肉是良性的，但息肉的数量、大小和表面结构与结肠癌的风险有关。已经开发了几种方法来自动检测和分割息肉。然而，主要问题是它们没有在大型多中心专用数据集上进行严格测试，原因之一是缺乏全面的公共数据集。因此，所开发的方法可能无法推广到不同的人口数据集。为此，我们从六个独特的中心收集了包含 300 多名患者的数据集。该数据集包括单帧数据和序列数据，其中包含 3762 个带注释的息肉标签，并由六位高级胃肠病学家验证了息肉边界的精确描绘。据我们所知，这是由计算科学家和胃肠病学专家团队策划的最全面的检测和像素级分割数据集（称为 \textit{PolypGen}）。本文提供了对数据构建和注释策略、质量保证和技术验证的见解。我们的数据集可以从 \url{ https://doi.org/10.7303/syn26376615} 下载。

AI.tldr: 本文的主要任务是构建一个用于评估泛化能力的多中心息肉检测和分割数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化息肉检测方法缺乏在大规模多中心数据集上的严格测试，导致模型泛化能力不足，且公开的综合数据集稀缺。
AI.method: 从六个独立中心收集超过300名患者的结肠镜检查数据，包含单帧和序列数据，由六位资深胃肠病学家标注3762个精确分割的息肉标签。
AI.result: 创建了名为PolypGen的最全面息肉检测与像素级分割数据集，包含经专家验证的精确标注，并提供下载链接。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为开发鲁棒的息肉检测算法提供了重要资源，可促进跨中心模型泛化能力的研究。

authors_text: Karim Lounici,Katia Meziani,Benjamin Riu
title: Muddling Label Regularization: Deep Learning for Tabular Datasets
title_zh: 混乱标签正则化：表格数据集的深度学习
abstract: Deep Learning (DL) is considered the state-of-the-art in computer vision, speech recognition and natural language processing. Until recently, it was also widely accepted that DL is irrelevant for learning tasks on tabular data, especially in the small sample regime where ensemble methods are acknowledged as the gold standard. We present a new end-to-end differentiable method to train a standard FFNN. Our method, \textbf{Muddling labels for Regularization} (\texttt{MLR}), penalizes memorization through the generation of uninformative labels and the application of a differentiable close-form regularization scheme on the last hidden layer during training. \texttt{MLR} outperforms classical NN and the gold standard (GBDT, RF) for regression and classification tasks on several datasets from the UCI database and Kaggle covering a large range of sample sizes and feature to sample ratios. Researchers and practitioners can use \texttt{MLR} on its own as an off-the-shelf \DL{} solution or integrate it into the most advanced ML pipelines.
summary: Deep Learning (DL) is considered the state-of-the-art in computer vision, speech recognition and natural language processing. Until recently, it was also widely accepted that DL is irrelevant for learning tasks on tabular data, especially in the small sample regime where ensemble methods are acknowledged as the gold standard. We present a new end-to-end differentiable method to train a standard FFNN. Our method, \textbf{Muddling labels for Regularization} (\texttt{MLR}), penalizes memorization through the generation of uninformative labels and the application of a differentiable close-form regularization scheme on the last hidden layer during training. \texttt{MLR} outperforms classical NN and the gold standard (GBDT, RF) for regression and classification tasks on several datasets from the UCI database and Kaggle covering a large range of sample sizes and feature to sample ratios. Researchers and practitioners can use \texttt{MLR} on its own as an off-the-shelf \DL{} solution or integrate it into the most advanced ML pipelines.
abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 被认为是计算机视觉、语音识别和自然语言处理领域的最先进技术。直到最近，人们还普遍认为深度学习与表格数据的学习任务无关，尤其是在小样本情况下，集成方法被认为是黄金标准。我们提出了一种新的端到端可微分方法来训练标准 FFNN。我们的方法 \textbf{Muddling labels for Regularization} (\texttt{MLR}) 通过生成无信息标签以及在训练期间在最后一个隐藏层上应用可微分的封闭式正则化方案来惩罚记忆。 \texttt{MLR} 在 UCI 数据库和 Kaggle 的多个数据集上执行回归和分类任务，其性能优于经典神经网络和黄金标准（GBDT、RF），涵盖了大范围的样本量和特征样本比。研究人员和从业者可以单独使用 \texttt{MLR} 作为现成的 \DL{} 解决方案，或将其集成到最先进的 ML 管道中。

AI.motivation: 传统深度学习在表格数据尤其是小样本场景下表现不佳，集成方法如GBDT和RF被认为是黄金标准，需寻找更有效的深度学习方法
AI.method: 提出MLR方法，通过生成无信息标签并结合可微闭式正则化方案，对最后一层隐藏层进行训练，以减少过拟合
AI.result: 在UCI和Kaggle的多个数据集上，MLR在回归和分类任务中优于传统神经网络及集成方法（如GBDT、RF）
AI.conclusion: MLR作为有效的深度学习方法，可独立使用或集成到先进机器学习流程中，提升表格数据任务的性能

search_text: Muddling Label Regularization: Deep Learning for Tabular Datasets 混乱标签正则化：表格数据集的深度学习 Deep Learning (DL) is considered the state-of-the-art in computer vision, speech recognition and natural language processing. Until recently, it was also widely accepted that DL is irrelevant for learning tasks on tabular data, especially in the small sample regime where ensemble methods are acknowledged as the gold standard. We present a new end-to-end differentiable method to train a standard FFNN. Our method, \textbf{Muddling labels for Regularization} (\texttt{MLR}), penalizes memorization through the generation of uninformative labels and the application of a differentiable close-form regularization scheme on the last hidden layer during training. \texttt{MLR} outperforms classical NN and the gold standard (GBDT, RF) for regression and classification tasks on several datasets from the UCI database and Kaggle covering a large range of sample sizes and feature to sample ratios. Researchers and practitioners can use \texttt{MLR} on its own as an off-the-shelf \DL{} solution or integrate it into the most advanced ML pipelines. 深度学习 (DL) 被认为是计算机视觉、语音识别和自然语言处理领域的最先进技术。直到最近，人们还普遍认为深度学习与表格数据的学习任务无关，尤其是在小样本情况下，集成方法被认为是黄金标准。我们提出了一种新的端到端可微分方法来训练标准 FFNN。我们的方法 \textbf{Muddling labels for Regularization} (\texttt{MLR}) 通过生成无信息标签以及在训练期间在最后一个隐藏层上应用可微分的封闭式正则化方案来惩罚记忆。 \texttt{MLR} 在 UCI 数据库和 Kaggle 的多个数据集上执行回归和分类任务，其性能优于经典神经网络和黄金标准（GBDT、RF），涵盖了大范围的样本量和特征样本比。研究人员和从业者可以单独使用 \texttt{MLR} 作为现成的 \DL{} 解决方案，或将其集成到最先进的 ML 管道中。 提出一种用于表格数据的深度学习方法，通过生成无信息标签和正则化来提升模型性能 Karim Lounici,Katia Meziani,Benjamin Riu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Kasey Jones,Emily Hadley,Sandy Preiss,Caroline Kery,Peter Baumgartner,Marie Stoner,Sarah Rhea
title: North Carolina COVID-19 Agent-Based Model Framework for Hospitalization Forecasting Overview, Design Concepts, and Details Protocol
title_zh: 北卡罗来纳州 COVID-19 基于代理的住院预测模型框架概述、设计概念和详细协议
abstract: This Overview, Design Concepts, and Details Protocol (ODD) provides a detailed description of an agent-based model (ABM) that was developed to simulate hospitalizations during the COVID-19 pandemic. Using the descriptions of submodels, provided parameters, and the links to data sources, modelers will be able to replicate the creation and results of this model.
summary: This Overview, Design Concepts, and Details Protocol (ODD) provides a detailed description of an agent-based model (ABM) that was developed to simulate hospitalizations during the COVID-19 pandemic. Using the descriptions of submodels, provided parameters, and the links to data sources, modelers will be able to replicate the creation and results of this model.
abstract_zh: 本概述、设计概念和详细协议 (ODD) 详细描述了基于代理的模型 (ABM)，该模型是为模拟 COVID-19 大流行期间的住院情况而开发的。使用子模型的描述、提供的参数以及数据源的链接，建模者将能够复制该模型的创建和结果。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个基于代理的模型框架，用于模拟北卡罗来纳州新冠疫情住院情况，并通过ODD协议详细描述模型设计以供复现。
AI.motivation: 疫情住院预测对医疗资源规划至关重要，传统方法难以捕捉复杂动态因素，需构建灵活模型以支持公共卫生决策。
AI.method: 采用基于代理的建模方法，通过子模型描述、参数设定及数据源链接，遵循ODD协议结构化呈现模型设计细节。
AI.result: 成功构建可复现的ABM框架，实现住院情况模拟，并提供完整参数与数据接口以支持模型验证与扩展。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为疫情住院预测提供了可扩展工具，通过标准化文档促进模型共享，有助于提升公共卫生应急响应能力。

authors_text: Jiayi Ma,Yuxin Deng
title: SDGMNet: Statistic-based Dynamic Gradient Modulation for Local Descriptor Learning
title_zh: SDGMNet：用于局部描述符学习的基于统计的动态梯度调制
abstract: Modifications on triplet loss that rescale the back-propagated gradients of special pairs have made significant progress on local descriptor learning. However, current gradient modulation strategies are mainly static so that they would suffer from changes of training phases or datasets. In this paper, we propose a dynamic gradient modulation, named SDGMNet, to improve triplet loss for local descriptor learning. The core of our method is formulating modulation functions with statistical characteristics which are estimated dynamically. Firstly, we perform deep analysis on back propagation of general triplet-based loss and introduce included angle for distance measure. On this basis, auto-focus modulation is employed to moderate the impact of statistically uncommon individual pairs in stochastic gradient descent optimization; probabilistic margin cuts off the gradients of proportional Siamese pairs that are believed to reach the optimum; power adjustment balances the total weights of negative pairs and positive pairs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our novel descriptor surpasses previous state-of-the-arts on standard benchmarks including patch verification, matching and retrieval tasks.
summary: Modifications on triplet loss that rescale the back-propagated gradients of special pairs have made significant progress on local descriptor learning. However, current gradient modulation strategies are mainly static so that they would suffer from changes of training phases or datasets. In this paper, we propose a dynamic gradient modulation, named SDGMNet, to improve triplet loss for local descriptor learning. The core of our method is formulating modulation functions with statistical characteristics which are estimated dynamically. Firstly, we perform deep analysis on back propagation of general triplet-based loss and introduce included angle for distance measure. On this basis, auto-focus modulation is employed to moderate the impact of statistically uncommon individual pairs in stochastic gradient descent optimization; probabilistic margin cuts off the gradients of proportional Siamese pairs that are believed to reach the optimum; power adjustment balances the total weights of negative pairs and positive pairs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our novel descriptor surpasses previous state-of-the-arts on standard benchmarks including patch verification, matching and retrieval tasks.
abstract_zh: 对三元组损失的修改重新调整了特殊对的反向传播梯度，在局部描述符学习方面取得了重大进展。然而，当前的梯度调制策略主要是静态的，因此它们会受到训练阶段或数据集的变化的影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 SDGMNet 的动态梯度调制，以改善局部描述符学习的三元组损失。我们方法的核心是制定具有动态估计的统计特征的调制函数。首先，我们对一般基于三元组的损失的反向传播进行了深入分析，并引入了距离测量的夹角。在此基础上，采用自动聚焦调制来调节随机梯度下降优化中统计上不常见的个体对的影响；概率边际截断了被认为达到最优的比例连体对的梯度；功率调整平衡负对和正对的总权重。大量的实验表明，我们的新颖描述符在标准基准（包括补丁验证、匹配和检索任务）上超越了以前的最先进技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SDGMNet，通过统计特性动态调整梯度模态，改进局部描述符学习的三元组损失函数。
AI.motivation: 现有梯度调制策略多为静态，难以适应训练阶段或数据集的变化，限制了局部描述符学习的性能。
AI.method: 基于统计特征动态构建调制函数，包含自动聚焦模态（抑制罕见样本对）、概率边距（截断接近最优的样本对梯度）和功率调节（平衡正负样本权重）三个核心模块。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中（包括补丁验证、匹配和检索任务），新方法的描述符性能优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 动态梯度调制策略能有效提升三元组损失的优化效率，为局部描述符学习提供新思路。
