On this basis, auto-focus modulation is employed to moderate the impact of statistically uncommon individual pairs in stochastic gradient descent optimization; probabilistic margin cuts off the gradients of proportional Siamese pairs that are believed to reach the optimum; power adjustment balances the total weights of negative pairs and positive pairs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our novel descriptor surpasses previous state-of-the-arts on standard benchmarks including patch verification, matching and retrieval tasks. 对三元组损失的修改重新调整了特殊对的反向传播梯度，在局部描述符学习方面取得了重大进展。然而，当前的梯度调制策略主要是静态的，因此它们会受到训练阶段或数据集的变化的影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 SDGMNet 的动态梯度调制，以改善局部描述符学习的三元组损失。我们方法的核心是制定具有动态估计的统计特征的调制函数。首先，我们对一般基于三元组的损失的反向传播进行了深入分析，并引入了距离测量的夹角。在此基础上，采用自动聚焦调制来调节随机梯度下降优化中统计上不常见的个体对的影响；概率边际截断了被认为达到最优的比例连体对的梯度；功率调整平衡负对和正对的总权重。大量的实验表明，我们的新颖描述符在标准基准（包括补丁验证、匹配和检索任务）上超越了以前的最先进技术。 本文提出SDGMNet，通过统计特性动态调整梯度模态，改进局部描述符学习的三元组损失函数。 Jiayi Ma,Yuxin Deng cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Younggeun Kim,Donghee Son
title: Noise Conditional Flow Model for Learning the Super-Resolution Space
title_zh: 用于学习超分辨率空间的噪声条件流模型
abstract: Fundamentally, super-resolution is ill-posed problem because a low-resolution image can be obtained from many high-resolution images. Recent studies for super-resolution cannot create diverse super-resolution images. Although SRFlow tried to account for ill-posed nature of the super-resolution by predicting multiple high-resolution images given a low-resolution image, there is room to improve the diversity and visual quality. In this paper, we propose Noise Conditional flow model for Super-Resolution, NCSR, which increases the visual quality and diversity of images through noise conditional layer. To learn more diverse data distribution, we add noise to training data. However, low-quality images are resulted from adding noise. We propose the noise conditional layer to overcome this phenomenon. The noise conditional layer makes our model generate more diverse images with higher visual quality than other works. Furthermore, we show that this layer can overcome data distribution mismatch, a problem that arises in normalizing flow models. With these benefits, NCSR outperforms baseline in diversity and visual quality and achieves better visual quality than traditional GAN-based models. We also get outperformed scores at NTIRE 2021 challenge.
summary: Fundamentally, super-resolution is ill-posed problem because a low-resolution image can be obtained from many high-resolution images. Recent studies for super-resolution cannot create diverse super-resolution images. Although SRFlow tried to account for ill-posed nature of the super-resolution by predicting multiple high-resolution images given a low-resolution image, there is room to improve the diversity and visual quality. In this paper, we propose Noise Conditional flow model for Super-Resolution, NCSR, which increases the visual quality and diversity of images through noise conditional layer. To learn more diverse data distribution, we add noise to training data. However, low-quality images are resulted from adding noise. We propose the noise conditional layer to overcome this phenomenon. The noise conditional layer makes our model generate more diverse images with higher visual quality than other works. Furthermore, we show that this layer can overcome data distribution mismatch, a problem that arises in normalizing flow models. With these benefits, NCSR outperforms baseline in diversity and visual quality and achieves better visual quality than traditional GAN-based models. We also get outperformed scores at NTIRE 2021 challenge.
abstract_zh: 从根本上来说，超分辨率是不适定问题，因为可以从许多高分辨率图像中获得低分辨率图像。最近的超分辨率研究无法创建多样化的超分辨率图像。尽管 SRFlow 试图通过在给定低分辨率图像的情况下预测多个高分辨率图像来解决超分辨率的不适定性质，但仍有改进多样性和视觉质量的空间。在本文中，我们提出了超分辨率噪声条件流模型，NCSR，它通过噪声条件层提高了图像的视觉质量和多样性。为了了解更多样化的数据分布，我们在训练数据中添加噪声。然而，添加噪声会导致低质量的图像。我们提出噪声条件层来克服这种现象。噪声条件层使我们的模型生成比其他作品更多样化、视觉质量更高的图像。此外，我们表明该层可以克服数据分布不匹配，这是标准化流模型中出现的问题。凭借这些优势，NCSR 在多样性和视觉质量方面优于基线，并比传统的基于 GAN 的模型实现了更好的视觉质量。我们还在 NTIRE 2021 挑战赛中获得了优异的成绩。

AI.tldr: 本文提出噪声条件流模型NCSR，通过引入噪声条件层提升超分辨率图像的多样性和视觉质量。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率方法难以生成多样化且高质量的图像，SRFlow等模型在处理病态问题时仍存在多样性不足和视觉质量缺陷。
AI.method: 在训练数据中添加噪声以学习更丰富的分布，设计噪声条件层抑制噪声干扰，解决归一化流模型的数据分布不匹配问题。
AI.result: NCSR在多样性与视觉质量上优于基线模型和传统GAN方法，并在NTIRE 2021挑战赛中取得更优成绩。
AI.conclusion: 噪声条件层有效提升了超分辨率模型的生成能力，验证了该方法在处理病态问题和分布不匹配上的优势。

authors_text: Alexander Hepburn,Valero Laparra,Raul Santos-Rodriguez,Johannes Ballé,Jesús Malo
title: On the relation between statistical learning and perceptual distances
title_zh: 论统计学习与知觉距离的关系
abstract: It has been demonstrated many times that the behavior of the human visual system is connected to the statistics of natural images. Since machine learning relies on the statistics of training data as well, the above connection has interesting implications when using perceptual distances (which mimic the behavior of the human visual system) as a loss function. In this paper, we aim to unravel the non-trivial relationships between the probability distribution of the data, perceptual distances, and unsupervised machine learning. To this end, we show that perceptual sensitivity is correlated with the probability of an image in its close neighborhood. We also explore the relation between distances induced by autoencoders and the probability distribution of the training data, as well as how these induced distances are correlated with human perception. Finally, we find perceptual distances do not always lead to noticeable gains in performance over Euclidean distance in common image processing tasks, except when data is scarce and the perceptual distance provides regularization. We propose this may be due to a \emph{double-counting} effect of the image statistics, once in the perceptual distance and once in the training procedure.
summary: It has been demonstrated many times that the behavior of the human visual system is connected to the statistics of natural images. Since machine learning relies on the statistics of training data as well, the above connection has interesting implications when using perceptual distances (which mimic the behavior of the human visual system) as a loss function. In this paper, we aim to unravel the non-trivial relationships between the probability distribution of the data, perceptual distances, and unsupervised machine learning. To this end, we show that perceptual sensitivity is correlated with the probability of an image in its close neighborhood. We also explore the relation between distances induced by autoencoders and the probability distribution of the training data, as well as how these induced distances are correlated with human perception. Finally, we find perceptual distances do not always lead to noticeable gains in performance over Euclidean distance in common image processing tasks, except when data is scarce and the perceptual distance provides regularization. We propose this may be due to a \emph{double-counting} effect of the image statistics, once in the perceptual distance and once in the training procedure.
abstract_zh: 已经多次证明，人类视觉系统的行为与自然图像的统计有关。由于机器学习也依赖于训练数据的统计，因此当使用感知距离（模仿人类视觉系统的行为）作为损失函数时，上述联系具有有趣的含义。在本文中，我们的目标是阐明数据概率分布、感知距离和无监督机器学习之间的重要关系。为此，我们证明感知灵敏度与其邻近图像的概率相关。我们还探讨了自动编码器引起的距离与训练数据的概率分布之间的关系，以及这些引起的距离如何与人类感知相关。最后，我们发现在常见的图像处理任务中，感知距离并不总是比欧几里德距离带来明显的性能提升，除非数据稀缺并且感知距离提供正则化。我们认为这可能是由于图像统计的 \emph{重复计数} 效应，一次在感知距离中，一次在训练过程中。

AI.tldr: 本文研究数据概率分布、感知距离与无监督机器学习之间的关系，探讨感知距离在图像处理任务中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 人类视觉系统对自然图像统计特性敏感，而机器学习依赖训练数据统计信息，因此需理解感知距离（模拟人类视觉）作为损失函数的潜在影响。
AI.method: 分析感知敏感度与图像邻域概率的相关性；比较自编码器诱导的距离与数据分布的关系；评估感知距离在图像任务中的性能表现。
AI.result: 感知距离在常见任务中未必优于欧几里得距离，仅在数据稀缺时通过正则化提升性能，可能因图像统计信息在感知距离与训练过程中双重计数导致。
AI.conclusion: 感知距离的效果受限于数据统计的双重使用，其优势仅在特定场景（如数据稀缺）中显现。

authors_text: Madhu R. Kamble,Jose A. Gonzalez-Lopez,Teresa Grau,Juan M. Espin,Lorenzo Cascioli,Yiqing Huang,Alejandro Gomez-Alanis,Jose Patino,Roberto Font,Antonio M. Peinado,Angel M. Gomez,Nicholas Evans,Maria A. Zuluaga,Massimiliano Todisco
title: PANACEA cough sound-based diagnosis of COVID-19 for the DiCOVA 2021 Challenge
title_zh: 用于 DiCOVA 2021 挑战赛的 PAACEA 基于咳嗽声音的 COVID-19 诊断
abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has led to the saturation of public health services worldwide. In this scenario, the early diagnosis of SARS-Cov-2 infections can help to stop or slow the spread of the virus and to manage the demand upon health services. This is especially important when resources are also being stretched by heightened demand linked to other seasonal diseases, such as the flu. In this context, the organisers of the DiCOVA 2021 challenge have collected a database with the aim of diagnosing COVID-19 through the use of coughing audio samples. This work presents the details of the automatic system for COVID-19 detection from cough recordings presented by team PANACEA. This team consists of researchers from two European academic institutions and one company: EURECOM (France), University of Granada (Spain), and Biometric Vox S.L. (Spain). We developed several systems based on established signal processing and machine learning methods. Our best system employs a Teager energy operator cepstral coefficients (TECCs) based frontend and Light gradient boosting machine (LightGBM) backend. The AUC obtained by this system on the test set is 76.31% which corresponds to a 10% improvement over the official baseline.
summary: The COVID-19 pandemic has led to the saturation of public health services worldwide. In this scenario, the early diagnosis of SARS-Cov-2 infections can help to stop or slow the spread of the virus and to manage the demand upon health services. This is especially important when resources are also being stretched by heightened demand linked to other seasonal diseases, such as the flu. In this context, the organisers of the DiCOVA 2021 challenge have collected a database with the aim of diagnosing COVID-19 through the use of coughing audio samples. This work presents the details of the automatic system for COVID-19 detection from cough recordings presented by team PANACEA. This team consists of researchers from two European academic institutions and one company: EURECOM (France), University of Granada (Spain), and Biometric Vox S.L. (Spain). We developed several systems based on established signal processing and machine learning methods. Our best system employs a Teager energy operator cepstral coefficients (TECCs) based frontend and Light gradient boosting machine (LightGBM) backend. The AUC obtained by this system on the test set is 76.31% which corresponds to a 10% improvement over the official baseline.
abstract_zh: COVID-19 大流行导致全球公共卫生服务饱和。在这种情况下，SARS-Cov-2 感染的早期诊断有助于阻止或减缓病毒的传播并管理对卫生服务的需求。当资源也因与其他季节性疾病（例如流感）相关的需求增加而紧张时，这一点尤其重要。在此背景下，DiCOVA 2021 挑战赛的组织者收集了一个数据库，旨在通过使用咳嗽音频样本来诊断 COVID-19。这项工作介绍了 PAACEA 团队提出的从咳嗽录音中检测 COVID-19 的自动系统的细节。该团队由来自两家欧洲学术机构和一家公司的研究人员组成：EURECOM（法国）、格拉纳达大学（西班牙）和 Biometric Vox S.L. （西班牙）。我们基于已建立的信号处理和机器学习方法开发了多个系统。我们最好的系统采用基于 Teager 能量算子倒谱系数 (TECC) 的前端和光梯度增强机 (LightGBM) 后端。该系统在测试集上获得的 AUC 为 76.31%，比官方基线提高了 10%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于咳嗽声的自动检测COVID-19系统，用于DiCOVA 2021挑战赛。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情导致公共卫生服务饱和，早期诊断有助于控制病毒传播并缓解医疗资源压力，尤其是在流感等季节性疾病高发时期。
AI.method: 采用Teager能量算子倒谱系数（TECCs）作为前端特征提取方法，结合LightGBM梯度提升机作为分类后端模型。
AI.result: 在测试集上达到76.31%的AUC值，较官方基线提升10%。
AI.conclusion: 该系统验证了基于咳嗽声纹的COVID-19检测可行性，为非接触式筛查提供了新思路，但需进一步优化以提高临床适用性。

search_text: PANACEA cough sound-based diagnosis of COVID-19 for the DiCOVA 2021 Challenge 用于 DiCOVA 2021 挑战赛的 PAACEA 基于咳嗽声音的 COVID-19 诊断 The COVID-19 pandemic has led to the saturation of public health services worldwide. In this scenario, the early diagnosis of SARS-Cov-2 infections can help to stop or slow the spread of the virus and to manage the demand upon health services. This is especially important when resources are also being stretched by heightened demand linked to other seasonal diseases, such as the flu. In this context, the organisers of the DiCOVA 2021 challenge have collected a database with the aim of diagnosing COVID-19 through the use of coughing audio samples. This work presents the details of the automatic system for COVID-19 detection from cough recordings presented by team PANACEA. This team consists of researchers from two European academic institutions and one company: EURECOM (France), University of Granada (Spain), and Biometric Vox S.L. (Spain). We developed several systems based on established signal processing and machine learning methods. Our best system employs a Teager energy operator cepstral coefficients (TECCs) based frontend and Light gradient boosting machine (LightGBM) backend. The AUC obtained by this system on the test set is 76.31% which corresponds to a 10% improvement over the official baseline. authors_text: Harshavardhan Kamarthi,Alexander Rodríguez,B. Aditya Prakash
title: Back2Future: Leveraging Backfill Dynamics for Improving Real-time Predictions in Future
title_zh: Back2Future：利用回填动态改进未来的实时预测
comment: 15 pages, 8 figures, To appear in ICLR 2022
comments: 15 pages, 8 figures, To appear in ICLR 2022
abstract: In real-time forecasting in public health, data collection is a non-trivial and demanding task. Often after initially released, it undergoes several revisions later (maybe due to human or technical constraints) - as a result, it may take weeks until the data reaches to a stable value. This so-called 'backfill' phenomenon and its effect on model performance has been barely studied in the prior literature. In this paper, we introduce the multi-variate backfill problem using COVID-19 as the motivating example. We construct a detailed dataset composed of relevant signals over the past year of the pandemic. We then systematically characterize several patterns in backfill dynamics and leverage our observations for formulating a novel problem and neural framework Back2Future that aims to refines a given model's predictions in real-time. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that our method refines the performance of top models for COVID-19 forecasting, in contrast to non-trivial baselines, yielding 18% improvement over baselines, enabling us obtain a new SOTA performance. In addition, we show that our model improves model evaluation too; hence policy-makers can better understand the true accuracy of forecasting models in real-time.
summary: In real-time forecasting in public health, data collection is a non-trivial and demanding task. Often after initially released, it undergoes several revisions later (maybe due to human or technical constraints) - as a result, it may take weeks until the data reaches to a stable value. This so-called 'backfill' phenomenon and its effect on model performance has been barely studied in the prior literature. In this paper, we introduce the multi-variate backfill problem using COVID-19 as the motivating example. We construct a detailed dataset composed of relevant signals over the past year of the pandemic. We then systematically characterize several patterns in backfill dynamics and leverage our observations for formulating a novel problem and neural framework Back2Future that aims to refines a given model's predictions in real-time. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that our method refines the performance of top models for COVID-19 forecasting, in contrast to non-trivial baselines, yielding 18% improvement over baselines, enabling us obtain a new SOTA performance. In addition, we show that our model improves model evaluation too; hence policy-makers can better understand the true accuracy of forecasting models in real-time.
abstract_zh: 在公共卫生的实时预测中，数据收集是一项艰巨且艰巨的任务。通常在最初发布后，它会经历多次修订（可能是由于人为或技术限制） - 因此，数据可能需要数周时间才能达到稳定值。先前的文献中几乎没有研究过这种所谓的“回填”现象及其对模型性能的影响。在本文中，我们以 COVID-19 为激励示例，介绍了多变量回填问题。我们构建了一个由过去一年的大流行相关信号组成的详细数据集。然后，我们系统地表征回填动态中的几种模式，并利用我们的观察来制定一个新问题和神经框架 Back2Future，旨在实时完善给定模型的预测。我们的大量实验表明，与非平凡的基线相比，我们的方法改进了 COVID-19 预测顶级模型的性能，比基线提高了 18%，使我们能够获得新的 SOTA 性能。此外，我们还表明我们的模型也改进了模型评估；因此，政策制定者可以更好地实时了解预测模型的真实准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Back2Future框架，利用回填动态改进公共卫生领域实时预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 公共卫生实时预测中数据收集困难且需多次修订，导致数据稳定延迟，现有研究对此关注不足，需改进模型以应对回填现象。
AI.method: 构建包含过去一年疫情相关信号的详细数据集，分析回填动态模式，提出结合神经网络的Back2Future框架，以实时优化模型预测。
AI.result: 实验表明，Back2Future在新冠预测中比基线模型提升18%，达到新SOTA，并增强模型评估，帮助政策制定者实时理解预测准确性。
AI.conclusion: Back2Future有效提升预测性能和评估，为应对数据延迟问题提供新思路，助力公共卫生决策。

authors_text: Raphaël Rozenberg,Joseph Gesnouin,Fabien Moutarde
title: Asymmetrical Bi-RNN for pedestrian trajectory encoding
title_zh: 用于行人轨迹编码的非对称 Bi-RNN
abstract: Pedestrian motion behavior involves a combination of individual goals and social interactions with other agents. In this article, we present an asymmetrical bidirectional recurrent neural network architecture called U-RNN to encode pedestrian trajectories and evaluate its relevance to replace LSTMs for various forecasting models. Experimental results on the Trajnet++ benchmark show that the U-LSTM variant yields better results regarding every available metrics (ADE, FDE, Collision rate) than common trajectory encoders for a variety of approaches and interaction modules, suggesting that the proposed approach is a viable alternative to the de facto sequence encoding RNNs. Our implementation of the asymmetrical Bi-RNNs for the Trajnet++ benchmark is available at: github.com/JosephGesnouin/Asymmetrical-Bi-RNNs-to-encode-pedestrian-trajectories
summary: Pedestrian motion behavior involves a combination of individual goals and social interactions with other agents. In this article, we present an asymmetrical bidirectional recurrent neural network architecture called U-RNN to encode pedestrian trajectories and evaluate its relevance to replace LSTMs for various forecasting models. Experimental results on the Trajnet++ benchmark show that the U-LSTM variant yields better results regarding every available metrics (ADE, FDE, Collision rate) than common trajectory encoders for a variety of approaches and interaction modules, suggesting that the proposed approach is a viable alternative to the de facto sequence encoding RNNs. Our implementation of the asymmetrical Bi-RNNs for the Trajnet++ benchmark is available at: github.com/JosephGesnouin/Asymmetrical-Bi-RNNs-to-encode-pedestrian-trajectories
abstract_zh: 行人运动行为涉及个人目标和与其他主体的社会互动的结合。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 U-RNN 的非对称双向循环神经网络架构，用于对行人轨迹进行编码，并评估其在各种预测模型中替代 LSTM 的相关性。 Trajnet++ 基准测试的实验结果表明，对于各种方法和交互模块，U-LSTM 变体在每个可用指标（ADE、FDE、碰撞率）方面都比常见轨迹编码器产生更好的结果，这表明所提出的方法是事实上的序列编码 RNN 的可行替代方案。我们针对 Trajnet++ 基准测试的非对称 Bi-RNN 实现可在以下位置找到：github.com/JosephGesnouin/Ametryal-Bi-RNNs-to-encode-pedestrian-trajectories

AI.tldr: 提出一种非对称双向RNN（U-RNN）用于行人轨迹编码，并验证其作为LSTM替代方案的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统LSTM在编码行人轨迹时难以有效捕捉社会互动与个体目标的复杂性，需更高效的模型。
AI.method: 设计非对称双向RNN架构U-RNN，用于行人轨迹编码，并在Trajnet++基准测试中评估其U-LSTM变体。
AI.result: 实验显示U-LSTM在ADE、FDE和碰撞率等指标上优于传统轨迹编码器，验证其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 非对称Bi-RNN（U-RNN）能有效编码行人轨迹，优于传统LSTM，是可行的替代方案。

search_text: Asymmetrical Bi-RNN for pedestrian trajectory encoding 用于行人轨迹编码的非对称 Bi-RNN Pedestrian motion behavior involves a combination of individual goals and social interactions with other agents. In this article, we present an asymmetrical bidirectional recurrent neural network architecture called U-RNN to encode pedestrian trajectories and evaluate its relevance to replace LSTMs for various forecasting models. Experimental results on the Trajnet++ benchmark show that the U-LSTM variant yields better results regarding every available metrics (ADE, FDE, Collision rate) than common trajectory encoders for a variety of approaches and interaction modules, suggesting that the proposed approach is a viable alternative to the de facto sequence encoding RNNs. Our implementation of the asymmetrical Bi-RNNs for the Trajnet++ benchmark is available at: github.com/JosephGesnouin/Asymmetrical-Bi-RNNs-to-encode-pedestrian-trajectories 行人运动行为涉及个人目标和与其他主体的社会互动的结合。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 U-RNN 的非对称双向循环神经网络架构，用于对行人轨迹进行编码，并评估其在各种预测模型中替代 LSTM 的相关性。 Trajnet++ 基准测试的实验结果表明，对于各种方法和交互模块，U-LSTM 变体在每个可用指标（ADE、FDE、碰撞率）方面都比常见轨迹编码器产生更好的结果，这表明所提出的方法是事实上的序列编码 RNN 的可行替代方案。我们针对 Trajnet++ 基准测试的非对称 Bi-RNN 实现可在以下位置找到：github.com/JosephGesnouin/Ametryal-Bi-RNNs-to-encode-pedestrian-trajectories 提出一种非对称双向RNN（U-RNN）用于行人轨迹编码，并验证其作为LSTM替代方案的有效性。 Raphaël Rozenberg,Joseph Gesnouin,Fabien Moutarde cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Shengdong Zhang,Ehsan Nezhadarya,Homa Fashandi,Jiayi Liu,Darin Graham,Mohak Shah
title: Stochastic Whitening Batch Normalization
title_zh: 随机美白批量归一化
comment: Accepted to the Main Conference of CVPR 2021
comments: Accepted to the Main Conference of CVPR 2021
abstract: Batch Normalization (BN) is a popular technique for training Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). BN uses scaling and shifting to normalize activations of mini-batches to accelerate convergence and improve generalization. The recently proposed Iterative Normalization (IterNorm) method improves these properties by whitening the activations iteratively using Newton's method. However, since Newton's method initializes the whitening matrix independently at each training step, no information is shared between consecutive steps. In this work, instead of exact computation of whitening matrix at each time step, we estimate it gradually during training in an online fashion, using our proposed Stochastic Whitening Batch Normalization (SWBN) algorithm. We show that while SWBN improves the convergence rate and generalization of DNNs, its computational overhead is less than that of IterNorm. Due to the high efficiency of the proposed method, it can be easily employed in most DNN architectures with a large number of layers. We provide comprehensive experiments and comparisons between BN, IterNorm, and SWBN layers to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed technique in conventional (many-shot) image classification and few-shot classification tasks.
summary: Batch Normalization (BN) is a popular technique for training Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). BN uses scaling and shifting to normalize activations of mini-batches to accelerate convergence and improve generalization. The recently proposed Iterative Normalization (IterNorm) method improves these properties by whitening the activations iteratively using Newton's method. However, since Newton's method initializes the whitening matrix independently at each training step, no information is shared between consecutive steps. In this work, instead of exact computation of whitening matrix at each time step, we estimate it gradually during training in an online fashion, using our proposed Stochastic Whitening Batch Normalization (SWBN) algorithm. We show that while SWBN improves the convergence rate and generalization of DNNs, its computational overhead is less than that of IterNorm. Due to the high efficiency of the proposed method, it can be easily employed in most DNN architectures with a large number of layers. We provide comprehensive experiments and comparisons between BN, IterNorm, and SWBN layers to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed technique in conventional (many-shot) image classification and few-shot classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 批量归一化 (BN) 是一种用于训练深度神经网络 (DNN) 的流行技术。 BN 使用缩放和移位来标准化小批量的激活，以加速收敛并提高泛化能力。最近提出的迭代归一化 (IterNorm) 方法通过使用牛顿法迭代白化激活来改进这些属性。然而，由于牛顿方法在每个训练步骤独立地初始化白化矩阵，因此连续步骤之间不共享信息。在这项工作中，我们不是在每个时间步精确计算白化矩阵，而是使用我们提出的随机白化批量归一化（SWBN）算法在在线训练过程中逐渐估计它。我们表明，虽然 SWBN 提高了 DNN 的收敛速度和泛化能力，但其计算开销低于 IterNorm。由于所提出的方法效率高，它可以很容易地应用于大多数具有大量层的 DNN 架构中。我们提供了 BN、IterNorm 和 SWBN 层之间的全面实验和比较，以证明所提出的技术在传统（多镜头）图像分类和少镜头分类任务中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为随机白化批量归一化（SWBN）的新方法，旨在改进深度神经网络训练中的归一化技术，以提高收敛速度和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统的批量归一化（BN）和迭代归一化（IterNorm）在处理深度神经网络时存在收敛速度和泛化能力的局限性，尤其IterNorm因计算开销大而效率不足。
AI.method: 通过在线估计白化矩阵而非每步精确计算，提出SWBN算法，在训练过程中逐步优化，减少计算负担并保持信息连续性。
AI.result: 实验表明，SWBN在收敛速度、泛化能力和计算效率上均优于BN和IterNorm，且适用于多层网络和少量样本分类任务。
AI.conclusion: SWBN是一种高效且通用的归一化方法，能够有效提升深度神经网络的训练性能，适合广泛部署于各类DNN架构中。

authors_text: Sangwon Jung,Donggyu Lee,Taeeon Park,Taesup Moon
title: Fair Feature Distillation for Visual Recognition
title_zh: 用于视觉识别的公平特征蒸馏
abstract: Fairness is becoming an increasingly crucial issue for computer vision, especially in the human-related decision systems. However, achieving algorithmic fairness, which makes a model produce indiscriminative outcomes against protected groups, is still an unresolved problem. In this paper, we devise a systematic approach which reduces algorithmic biases via feature distillation for visual recognition tasks, dubbed as MMD-based Fair Distillation (MFD). While the distillation technique has been widely used in general to improve the prediction accuracy, to the best of our knowledge, there has been no explicit work that also tries to improve fairness via distillation. Furthermore, We give a theoretical justification of our MFD on the effect of knowledge distillation and fairness. Throughout the extensive experiments, we show our MFD significantly mitigates the bias against specific minorities without any loss of the accuracy on both synthetic and real-world face datasets.
summary: Fairness is becoming an increasingly crucial issue for computer vision, especially in the human-related decision systems. However, achieving algorithmic fairness, which makes a model produce indiscriminative outcomes against protected groups, is still an unresolved problem. In this paper, we devise a systematic approach which reduces algorithmic biases via feature distillation for visual recognition tasks, dubbed as MMD-based Fair Distillation (MFD). While the distillation technique has been widely used in general to improve the prediction accuracy, to the best of our knowledge, there has been no explicit work that also tries to improve fairness via distillation. Furthermore, We give a theoretical justification of our MFD on the effect of knowledge distillation and fairness. Throughout the extensive experiments, we show our MFD significantly mitigates the bias against specific minorities without any loss of the accuracy on both synthetic and real-world face datasets.
abstract_zh: 公平性正成为计算机视觉日益重要的问题，特别是在与人类相关的决策系统中。然而，实现算法公平性（使模型对受保护群体产生不加区别的结果）仍然是一个未解决的问题。在本文中，我们设计了一种系统方法，通过视觉识别任务的特征蒸馏来减少算法偏差，称为基于 MMD 的公平蒸馏（MFD）。虽然蒸馏技术已广泛用于提高预测精度，但据我们所知，还没有明确的工作试图通过蒸馏来提高公平性。此外，我们还从理论上证明了我们的 MFD 对知识蒸馏和公平性的影响。在整个广泛的实验中，我们表明我们的 MFD 显着减轻了针对特定少数群体的偏见，而不会损失合成和现实世界人脸数据集的准确性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于特征蒸馏的方法来减少视觉识别中的算法偏见。
AI.motivation: 解决视觉识别中的算法公平性问题，减少对特定少数群体的歧视。
AI.method: 提出MMD-based Fair Distillation (MFD)方法，通过特征蒸馏减少偏见，并提供理论支持。
AI.result: 在合成和真实人脸数据集上显著减轻偏见，同时保持准确率。
AI.conclusion: MFD有效提升视觉识别的公平性，无需牺牲准确性。

authors_text: Ruslan Shaydulin,Alexey Galda
title: Error Mitigation for Deep Quantum Optimization Circuits by Leveraging Problem Symmetries
title_zh: 利用问题对称性减轻深度量子优化电路的误差
abstract: High error rates and limited fidelity of quantum gates in near-term quantum devices are the central obstacles to successful execution of the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA). In this paper we introduce an application-specific approach for mitigating the errors in QAOA evolution by leveraging the symmetries present in the classical objective function to be optimized. Specifically, the QAOA state is projected into the symmetry-restricted subspace, with projection being performed either at the end of the circuit or throughout the evolution. Our approach improves the fidelity of the QAOA state, thereby increasing both the accuracy of the sample estimate of the QAOA objective and the probability of sampling the binary string corresponding to that objective value. We demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed methods on QAOA applied to the MaxCut problem, although our methods are general and apply to any objective function with symmetries, as well as to the generalization of QAOA with alternative mixers. We experimentally verify the proposed methods on an IBM Quantum processor, utilizing up to 5 qubits. When leveraging a global bit-flip symmetry, our approach leads to a 23% average improvement in quantum state fidelity.
summary: High error rates and limited fidelity of quantum gates in near-term quantum devices are the central obstacles to successful execution of the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA). In this paper we introduce an application-specific approach for mitigating the errors in QAOA evolution by leveraging the symmetries present in the classical objective function to be optimized. Specifically, the QAOA state is projected into the symmetry-restricted subspace, with projection being performed either at the end of the circuit or throughout the evolution. Our approach improves the fidelity of the QAOA state, thereby increasing both the accuracy of the sample estimate of the QAOA objective and the probability of sampling the binary string corresponding to that objective value. We demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed methods on QAOA applied to the MaxCut problem, although our methods are general and apply to any objective function with symmetries, as well as to the generalization of QAOA with alternative mixers. We experimentally verify the proposed methods on an IBM Quantum processor, utilizing up to 5 qubits. When leveraging a global bit-flip symmetry, our approach leads to a 23% average improvement in quantum state fidelity.
abstract_zh: 近期量子器件中量子门的高错误率和有限的保真度是成功执行量子近似优化算法（QAOA）的主要障碍。在本文中，我们介绍了一种特定于应用程序的方法，通过利用要优化的经典目标函数中存在的对称性来减轻 QAOA 演化中的错误。具体来说，QAOA 状态被投影到对称限制子空间中，投影在电路末端或整个演化过程中执行。我们的方法提高了 QAOA 状态的保真度，从而提高了 QAOA 目标样本估计的准确性以及对与该目标值相对应的二进制字符串进行采样的概率。我们证明了所提出的方法在应用于 MaxCut 问题的 QAOA 上的有效性，尽管我们的方法是通用的并且适用于具有对称性的任何目标函数，以及具有替代混合器的 QAOA 的泛化。我们利用多达 5 个量子位，在 IBM Quantum 处理器上通过实验验证了所提出的方法。当利用全局位翻转对称性时，我们的方法使量子态保真度平均提高了 23%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用问题对称性缓解量子近似优化算法（QAOA）中的错误，通过将量子态投影到对称性受限子空间以提高计算准确性。
AI.motivation: 当前量子设备的高错误率和有限保真度严重阻碍了QAOA算法的执行效果，亟需针对性的错误缓解方法。
AI.method: 通过将QAOA量子态投影到由目标函数对称性定义的子空间，投影操作可在电路演化过程中或最终阶段实施。
AI.result: 在IBM量子处理器上针对MaxCut问题验证，利用全局比特翻转对称性使量子态保真度平均提升23%，方法适用于各类具有对称性的目标函数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了QAOA的量子态保真度与目标函数采样精度，为量子优化算法的错误缓解提供了通用性解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出利用问题对称性缓解量子近似优化算法（QAOA）中的错误，通过将量子态投影到对称性受限子空间以提高计算准确性。

search_text: Error Mitigation for Deep Quantum Optimization Circuits by Leveraging Problem Symmetries 利用问题对称性减轻深度量子优化电路的误差 High error rates and limited fidelity of quantum gates in near-term quantum devices are the central obstacles to successful execution of the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA). In this paper we introduce an application-specific approach for mitigating the errors in QAOA evolution by leveraging the symmetries present in the classical objective function to be optimized. Specifically, the QAOA state is projected into the symmetry-restricted subspace, with projection being performed either at the end of the circuit or throughout the evolution. Our approach improves the fidelity of the QAOA state, thereby increasing both the accuracy of the sample estimate of the QAOA objective and the probability of sampling the binary string corresponding to that objective value. We demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed methods on QAOA applied to the MaxCut problem, although our methods are general and apply to any objective function with symmetries, as well as to the generalization of QAOA with alternative mixers. We experimentally verify the proposed methods on an IBM Quantum processor, utilizing up to 5 qubits. When leveraging a global bit-flip symmetry, our approach leads to a 23% average improvement in quantum state fidelity. 近期量子器件中量子门的高错误率和有限的保真度是成功执行量子近似优化算法（QAOA）的主要障碍。在本文中，我们介绍了一种特定于应用程序的方法，通过利用要优化的经典目标函数中存在的对称性来减轻 QAOA 演化中的错误。具体来说，QAOA 状态被投影到对称限制子空间中，投影在电路末端或整个演化过程中执行。我们的方法提高了 QAOA 状态的保真度，从而提高了 QAOA 目标样本估计的准确性以及对与该目标值相对应的二进制字符串进行采样的概率。我们证明了所提出的方法在应用于 MaxCut 问题的 QAOA 上的有效性，尽管我们的方法是通用的并且适用于具有对称性的任何目标函数，以及具有替代混合器的 QAOA 的泛化。我们利用多达 5 个量子位，在 IBM Quantum 处理器上通过实验验证了所提出的方法。当利用全局位翻转对称性时，我们的方法使量子态保真度平均提高了 23%。 本文提出利用问题对称性缓解量子近似优化算法（QAOA）中的错误，通过将量子态投影到对称性受限子空间以提高计算准确性。 Ruslan Shaydulin,Alexey Galda quant-ph,cs.ET

authors_text: Ioannis Kazakos,Carles Ventura,Miriam Bellver,Carina Silberer,Xavier Giro-i-Nieto
title: SynthRef: Generation of Synthetic Referring Expressions for Object Segmentation
title_zh: SynthRef：生成用于对象分割的综合引用表达式
comment: Accepted as poster at the NAACL 2021 Visually Grounded Interaction and Language (ViGIL) Workshop. 4 pages. Project website: https://imatge-upc.github.io/synthref/
comments: Accepted as poster at the NAACL 2021 Visually Grounded Interaction and Language (ViGIL) Workshop. 4 pages. Project website: https://imatge-upc.github.io/synthref/
abstract: Recent advances in deep learning have brought significant progress in visual grounding tasks such as language-guided video object segmentation. However, collecting large datasets for these tasks is expensive in terms of annotation time, which represents a bottleneck. To this end, we propose a novel method, namely SynthRef, for generating synthetic referring expressions for target objects in an image (or video frame), and we also present and disseminate the first large-scale dataset with synthetic referring expressions for video object segmentation. Our experiments demonstrate that by training with our synthetic referring expressions one can improve the ability of a model to generalize across different datasets, without any additional annotation cost. Moreover, our formulation allows its application to any object detection or segmentation dataset.
summary: Recent advances in deep learning have brought significant progress in visual grounding tasks such as language-guided video object segmentation. However, collecting large datasets for these tasks is expensive in terms of annotation time, which represents a bottleneck. To this end, we propose a novel method, namely SynthRef, for generating synthetic referring expressions for target objects in an image (or video frame), and we also present and disseminate the first large-scale dataset with synthetic referring expressions for video object segmentation. Our experiments demonstrate that by training with our synthetic referring expressions one can improve the ability of a model to generalize across different datasets, without any additional annotation cost. Moreover, our formulation allows its application to any object detection or segmentation dataset.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的最新进展为视觉基础任务（例如语言引导的视频对象分割）带来了重大进展。然而，为这些任务收集大型数据集在注释时间方面是昂贵的，这代表了瓶颈。为此，我们提出了一种新方法，即 SynthRef，用于为图像（或视频帧）中的目标对象生成合成引用表达式，并且我们还提出并传播了第一个具有用于视频对象分割的合成引用表达式的大规模数据集。我们的实验表明，通过使用我们的合成引用表达式进行训练，可以提高模型在不同数据集上泛化的能力，而无需任何额外的注释成本。此外，我们的公式允许其应用于任何对象检测或分割数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SynthRef方法，用于生成图像或视频帧中目标对象的合成指代表达式，并构建首个大规模合成指代表达式数据集，以提升视频对象分割的模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉接地任务（如语言引导的视频对象分割）依赖大量人工标注数据，但标注成本高昂且效率低下，限制了模型性能提升。
AI.method: 设计SynthRef方法自动生成合成指代表达式，并发布包含这些表达式的首个大规模视频对象分割数据集，无需额外人工标注。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用合成指代表达式训练的模型可提升跨数据集的泛化能力，且方法兼容任何目标检测或分割数据集。
AI.conclusion: SynthRef通过自动化生成合成数据，有效降低标注成本并提升模型性能，为视觉接地任务提供通用解决方案。

authors_text: Jingjing Xiong,Lai-Man Po,Wing-Yin Yu,Chang Zhou,Pengfei Xian,Weifeng Ou
title: CSRNet: Cascaded Selective Resolution Network for Real-time Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: CSRNet：用于实时语义分割的级联选择性解析网络
abstract: Real-time semantic segmentation has received considerable attention due to growing demands in many practical applications, such as autonomous vehicles, robotics, etc. Existing real-time segmentation approaches often utilize feature fusion to improve segmentation accuracy. However, they fail to fully consider the feature information at different resolutions and the receptive fields of the networks are relatively limited, thereby compromising the performance. To tackle this problem, we propose a light Cascaded Selective Resolution Network (CSRNet) to improve the performance of real-time segmentation through multiple context information embedding and enhanced feature aggregation. The proposed network builds a three-stage segmentation system, which integrates feature information from low resolution to high resolution and achieves feature refinement progressively. CSRNet contains two critical modules: the Shorted Pyramid Fusion Module (SPFM) and the Selective Resolution Module (SRM). The SPFM is a computationally efficient module to incorporate the global context information and significantly enlarge the receptive field at each stage. The SRM is designed to fuse multi-resolution feature maps with various receptive fields, which assigns soft channel attentions across the feature maps and helps to remedy the problem caused by multi-scale objects. Comprehensive experiments on two well-known datasets demonstrate that the proposed CSRNet effectively improves the performance for real-time segmentation.
summary: Real-time semantic segmentation has received considerable attention due to growing demands in many practical applications, such as autonomous vehicles, robotics, etc. Existing real-time segmentation approaches often utilize feature fusion to improve segmentation accuracy. However, they fail to fully consider the feature information at different resolutions and the receptive fields of the networks are relatively limited, thereby compromising the performance. To tackle this problem, we propose a light Cascaded Selective Resolution Network (CSRNet) to improve the performance of real-time segmentation through multiple context information embedding and enhanced feature aggregation. The proposed network builds a three-stage segmentation system, which integrates feature information from low resolution to high resolution and achieves feature refinement progressively. CSRNet contains two critical modules: the Shorted Pyramid Fusion Module (SPFM) and the Selective Resolution Module (SRM). The SPFM is a computationally efficient module to incorporate the global context information and significantly enlarge the receptive field at each stage. The SRM is designed to fuse multi-resolution feature maps with various receptive fields, which assigns soft channel attentions across the feature maps and helps to remedy the problem caused by multi-scale objects. Comprehensive experiments on two well-known datasets demonstrate that the proposed CSRNet effectively improves the performance for real-time segmentation.
abstract_zh: 由于许多实际应用（例如自动驾驶汽车、机器人等）的需求不断增长，实时语义分割受到了相当多的关注。现有的实时分割方法通常利用特征融合来提高分割精度。然而，它们未能充分考虑不同分辨率下的特征信息，并且网络的感受野相对有限，从而影响了性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种轻型级联选择性分辨率网络（CSRNet），通过多个上下文信息嵌入和增强的特征聚合来提高实时分割的性能。所提出的网络构建了一个三级分割系统，集成了从低分辨率到高分辨率的特征信息，并逐步实现特征细化。 CSRNet 包含两个关键模块：短路金字塔融合模块 (SPFM) 和选择性解析模块 (SRM)。 SPFM 是一个计算效率很高的模块，可以合并全局上下文信息并显着扩大每个阶段的感受野。 SRM旨在将多分辨率特征图与各种感受野融合，从而在特征图上分配软通道注意力，并有助于解决多尺度对象引起的问题。对两个著名数据集的综合实验表明，所提出的 CSRNet 有效提高了实时分割的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CSRNet，一种级联选择性分辨率网络，用于提升实时语义分割的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有实时分割方法未能充分考虑不同分辨率的特征信息及网络感受野有限，导致性能不足。
AI.method: 设计包含短金字塔融合模块（SPFM）和选择性分辨率模块（SRM）的三级分割系统，通过多上下文信息嵌入和增强特征聚合实现渐进式特征优化。
AI.result: 在两个知名数据集上的实验表明，CSRNet有效提升了实时分割性能。
AI.conclusion: CSRNet通过SPFM和SRM模块解决了多尺度目标分割问题，为实时语义分割提供了新思路。
